src/supabase_mock.ts:      console.warn("Failed to persist cache", e);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }, 1000);
src/supabase_mock.ts:}
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:function updateGlobalCache(collection: string, id: string, data: any, isDelete = false) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  initCache(collection);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (isDelete) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    delete globalCache[collection][id];
src/supabase_mock.ts:  } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    globalCache[collection][id] = data;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  persistCache(collection);
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/supabase_mock.ts:function getFromCache(collection: string, id: string) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  initCache(collection);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return globalCache[collection]?.[id];

src/supabase_mock.ts:function applyQueryLocally(ref: CollRef | Query) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const collectionName = ref.collectionName;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  initCache(collectionName);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const docsMap = globalCache[collectionName] || {};
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let docs = Object.entries(docsMap).map(([id, data]) => ({
src/supabase_mock.ts:    id,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    data: () => data,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    exists: () => true,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref: doc("db", collectionName, id),
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (ref instanceof Query) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref.filters.forEach((f) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      docs = docs.filter((d) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const val = (d.data() as any)[f.field];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (f.op === "==") return val == f.value;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (f.op === "<") return val < f.value;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (f.op === ">") return val > f.value;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        return true;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref.orderBys.forEach((o) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      docs.sort((a, b) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const valA = (a.data() as any)[o.field];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const valB = (b.data() as any)[o.field];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (valA < valB) return o.dir === "asc" ? -1 : 1;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (valA > valB) return o.dir === "asc" ? 1 : -1;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        return 0;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (ref.qlimit) docs = docs.slice(0, ref.qlimit);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    docs,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    empty: docs.length === 0,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    forEach: (cb: any) => docs.forEach(cb),
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/supabase_mock.ts:export async function getDoc(ref: DocRef) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const cached = getFromCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (cached) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      return {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          exists: () => true,
src/supabase_mock.ts:          id: ref.id,
src/supabase_mock.ts:          data: () => cached
src/supabase_mock.ts:      };
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const { data, error } = await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .select("id, collection, data")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("id", ref.id)
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .single();
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (error && error.code !== "PGRST116") { // Ignore strict single row missing error
src/supabase_mock.ts:    console.error("getDoc error:", error);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    throw new Error(error.message || JSON.stringify(error));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (data) updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, data.data);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    exists: () => !!data,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    id: ref.id,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    data: () => (data ? data.data : undefined),
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:export async function getDocs(ref: CollRef | Query) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let sb = supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .select("id, collection, data")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("collection", ref.collectionName);
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (ref instanceof Query) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref.filters.forEach((f) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const fieldStr = `data->>${f.field}`;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (f.op === "==") sb = sb.eq(fieldStr, f.value);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (f.op === "<") sb = sb.lt(fieldStr, f.value);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (f.op === ">") sb = sb.gt(fieldStr, f.value);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref.orderBys.forEach((o) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      sb = sb.order(`data->${o.field}`, { ascending: o.dir === "asc" });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    });
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (ref.qlimit) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      sb = sb.limit(ref.qlimit);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let data = null, error = null;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let retries = 3;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  while (retries > 0) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    try {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const res = await Promise.race([
src/supabase_mock.ts:        sb,
src/supabase_mock.ts:        new Promise((_, reject) =>
src/supabase_mock.ts:          setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('client_timeout')), 15000)
src/supabase_mock.ts:        )
src/supabase_mock.ts:      ]) as any;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      data = res.data;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      error = res.error;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (error && (
src/supabase_mock.ts:        error.message?.includes('statement timeout') ||
src/supabase_mock.ts:        error.message?.includes('client_timeout')
src/supabase_mock.ts:      )) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        retries--;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        console.warn(`Timeout for ${ref.collectionName}, retry ${3 - retries}/3...`);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const delay = (3 - retries) * 1500; // 1.5s, 3s, 4.5s
src/supabase_mock.ts:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
src/supabase_mock.ts:      } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        break;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      retries--;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const delay = (3 - retries) * 1500; // 1.5s, 3s, 4.5s
src/supabase_mock.ts:      console.warn(`Fetch error for ${ref.collectionName}, retry ${3 - retries}/3...`, e);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (retries === 0) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        error = e;
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // If still failing, serve from cache silently
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (error) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    initCache(ref.collectionName);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    const cached = globalCache[ref.collectionName];
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (cached && Object.keys(cached).length > 0) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      console.warn(`Serving ${ref.collectionName} from cache due to timeout`);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const docs = Object.entries(cached).map(([id, d]: any) => ({
src/supabase_mock.ts:        id,
src/supabase_mock.ts:        data: () => d,
src/supabase_mock.ts:        exists: () => true,
src/supabase_mock.ts:        ref: doc(ref as CollRef, id),
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:      return { docs, empty: docs.length === 0, forEach: (cb: any) => docs.forEach(cb) };
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    // Silently continue if cache is completely empty instead of crashing
src/supabase_mock.ts:    console.warn(`Falling back to empty response for ${ref.collectionName}`);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    return { docs: [], empty: true, forEach: () => {} };
src/supabase_mock.ts:  } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    (data || []).forEach((d: any) => updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, d.id, d.data));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const docs = (data || []).map((d: any) => ({
src/supabase_mock.ts:    id: d.id,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    data: () => d.data,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    exists: () => true,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ref: doc(ref as CollRef, d.id),
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    docs,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    empty: docs.length === 0,
src/supabase_mock.ts:    forEach: (cb: any) => docs.forEach(cb),
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:}
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:async function handleSpecialOps(target: any, incoming: any) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const result = { ...target };
src/supabase_mock.ts:  for (const key in incoming) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    const val = incoming[key];
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (val && typeof val === "object" && val.__op === "increment") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      result[key] = (Number(target[key]) || 0) + val.val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:    } else if (val && typeof val === "object" && val.__op === "arrayUnion") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const existing = Array.isArray(target[key]) ? target[key] : [];
src/supabase_mock.ts:      result[key] = [...existing, ...val.vals];
src/supabase_mock.ts:    } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      result[key] = val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return result;
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/supabase_mock.ts:export async function setDoc(ref: DocRef, data: any, options: any = {}) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const finalData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(data)); // strip undefined
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let dataToSave = finalData;
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // Optimistic update for non-merge or if we can guess the state
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (!options?.merge) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, dataToSave);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (options && options.merge) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    const { data: existing } = await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .select("data")
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .eq("id", ref.id)
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .single();
src/supabase_mock.ts:    
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (existing) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      dataToSave = await handleSpecialOps(existing.data, finalData);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:        .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:        .update({ data: dataToSave })
src/supabase_mock.ts:        .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:        .eq("id", ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      
src/supabase_mock.ts:      updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, dataToSave);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:      return;
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (Object.values(dataToSave).some((v: any) => v && v.__op)) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    dataToSave = await handleSpecialOps({}, dataToSave);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const { error } = await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .upsert(
src/supabase_mock.ts:      { id: ref.id, collection: ref.collectionName, data: dataToSave },
src/supabase_mock.ts:      { onConflict: "collection,id" },
src/supabase_mock.ts:    );
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (error) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    console.error("setDoc upsert error:", error);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, dataToSave);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));

src/supabase_mock.ts:export async function updateDoc(ref: DocRef, data: any) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const finalData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(data));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // Try to find cached data for optimistic update
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const cached = getFromCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (cached) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const nextData = { ...cached };
src/supabase_mock.ts:      for (const key in finalData) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          const val = finalData[key];
src/supabase_mock.ts:          if (key.includes(".")) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:              const parts = key.split(".");
src/supabase_mock.ts:              let cur = nextData;
src/supabase_mock.ts:              for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:                  cur[parts[i]] = cur[parts[i]] || {};
src/supabase_mock.ts:                  cur = cur[parts[i]];
src/supabase_mock.ts:              }
src/supabase_mock.ts:              const lastPart = parts[parts.length - 1];
src/supabase_mock.ts:              cur[lastPart] = val; // Nested increment/arrayUnion not fully mocked here but simple assignments work
src/supabase_mock.ts:          } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:              nextData[key] = val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:          }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, nextData);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const { data: existing } = await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .select("data")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("id", ref.id)
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .single();
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (existing) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    const nextData = { ...existing.data };
src/supabase_mock.ts:    
src/supabase_mock.ts:    // First handle dot notation keys to find the target object
src/supabase_mock.ts:    for (const key in finalData) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      const val = finalData[key];
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (key.includes(".")) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const parts = key.split(".");
src/supabase_mock.ts:        let cur = nextData;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          cur[parts[i]] = cur[parts[i]] || {};
src/supabase_mock.ts:          cur = cur[parts[i]];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const lastPart = parts[parts.length - 1];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (val && val.__op === "increment") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          cur[lastPart] = (Number(cur[lastPart]) || 0) + val.val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else if (val && val.__op === "arrayUnion") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          const arr = Array.isArray(cur[lastPart]) ? cur[lastPart] : [];
src/supabase_mock.ts:          cur[lastPart] = [...arr, ...val.vals];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          cur[lastPart] = val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (val && val.__op === "increment") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          nextData[key] = (Number(nextData[key]) || 0) + val.val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else if (val && val.__op === "arrayUnion") {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          const arr = Array.isArray(nextData[key]) ? nextData[key] : [];
src/supabase_mock.ts:          nextData[key] = [...arr, ...val.vals];
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          nextData[key] = val;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    
src/supabase_mock.ts:    await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .update({ data: nextData })
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:      .eq("id", ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    
src/supabase_mock.ts:    updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, nextData);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:}
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:export async function deleteDoc(ref: DocRef) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  updateGlobalCache(ref.collectionName, ref.id, null, true);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  localEmitter.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('db_change', { detail: ref.collectionName }));
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const { error } = await supabase
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .from("documents")
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .delete()
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("collection", ref.collectionName)
src/supabase_mock.ts:    .eq("id", ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  if (error) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    console.error("deleteDoc error:", error);
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }
src/supabase_mock.ts:}
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:export function onSnapshot(ref: any, callback: any, errorCb?: any) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const isDoc = ref instanceof DocRef;
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const collectionName = isDoc
src/supabase_mock.ts:    ? ref.collectionName
src/supabase_mock.ts:    : (ref as unknown as CollRef | Query).collectionName;
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  let _mounted = true;
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const fetchAndNotify = async () => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    try {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (isDoc) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const cached = getFromCache(collectionName, ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (cached) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          callback({ exists: () => true, id: ref.id, data: () => cached });
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          const d = await getDoc(ref);
src/supabase_mock.ts:          if (_mounted && d.exists()) callback(d);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        initCache(collectionName);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const hasCache = globalCache[collectionName] && Object.keys(globalCache[collectionName]).length > 0;
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (hasCache) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          callback(applyQueryLocally(ref));
src/supabase_mock.ts:        } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          const snap = await getDocs(ref);
src/supabase_mock.ts:          if (_mounted) callback(snap);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    } catch (err) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (errorCb) errorCb(err);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // Initial fetch immediately
src/supabase_mock.ts:  fetchAndNotify();
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // ✅ Poll with smart jitter to avoid thundering herd database timeouts
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const BASE_INTERVAL = 2 * 60 * 1000; // 2 minutes
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const JITTER = Math.floor(Math.random() * 45000); // Up to 45s of jitter
src/supabase_mock.ts:  
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const timer = setInterval(async () => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (!_mounted) return;
src/supabase_mock.ts:    try {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (isDoc) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const d = await getDoc(ref);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (_mounted && d.exists()) callback(d);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const snap = await getDocs(ref);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        // Only if successful do we replace the cache to handle document deletions
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (_mounted) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:          if (!(ref instanceof Query) || ref.filters.length === 0) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:            // For full collection fetches, we can confidently wipe deleted records
src/supabase_mock.ts:            globalCache[collectionName] = {};
src/supabase_mock.ts:            snap.forEach((doc: any) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:                globalCache[collectionName][doc.id] = doc.data();
src/supabase_mock.ts:            });
src/supabase_mock.ts:            persistCache(collectionName);
src/supabase_mock.ts:          }
src/supabase_mock.ts:          callback(applyQueryLocally(ref));
src/supabase_mock.ts:        }
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    } catch (err) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (errorCb) errorCb(err);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      console.warn("Polling fetch failed, keeping cache intact:", err);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  }, BASE_INTERVAL + JITTER);
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  // Local emitter still works for instant updates when THIS tab writes
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const localHandler = (e: any) => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    if (e.detail === collectionName && _mounted) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      if (isDoc) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        const cached = getFromCache(collectionName, ref.id);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        callback(cached
src/supabase_mock.ts:          ? { exists: () => true, id: ref.id, data: () => cached }
src/supabase_mock.ts:          : { exists: () => false, id: ref.id, data: () => undefined }
src/supabase_mock.ts:        );
src/supabase_mock.ts:      } else {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        callback(applyQueryLocally(ref));
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    }
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:  localEmitter.addEventListener('db_change', localHandler);
src/supabase_mock.ts:
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return () => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    _mounted = false;
src/supabase_mock.ts:    clearInterval(timer);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    localEmitter.removeEventListener('db_change', localHandler);
src/supabase_mock.ts:    // No supabase.removeChannel needed — no channel opened!
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/supabase_mock.ts:export function writeBatch(db: any) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:  const operations: any[] = [];
src/supabase_mock.ts:  return {
src/supabase_mock.ts:    set: (ref: DocRef, data: any, options: any = {}) =>
src/supabase_mock.ts:      operations.push({ type: "set", ref, data, options }),
src/supabase_mock.ts:    update: (ref: DocRef, data: any) =>
src/supabase_mock.ts:      operations.push({ type: "update", ref, data }),
src/supabase_mock.ts:    delete: (ref: DocRef) => operations.push({ type: "delete", ref }),
src/supabase_mock.ts:    commit: async () => {
src/supabase_mock.ts:      for (const op of operations) {
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (op.type === "set") await setDoc(op.ref, op.data, op.options);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (op.type === "update") await updateDoc(op.ref, op.data);
src/supabase_mock.ts:        if (op.type === "delete") await deleteDoc(op.ref);
src/supabase_mock.ts:      }
src/supabase_mock.ts:    },
src/supabase_mock.ts:  };
src/supabase_mock.ts:}

src/App.tsx:const getMatchdayDate = (matchday: number) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 1) return "27th March 2026";
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 2) return "28th March 2026";
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 3) return "29th March 2026";
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 4) return "30th March 2026";
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 5) return "31st March 2026";
src/App.tsx:  if (matchday === 6) return "1st April 2026";
src/App.tsx:  return `${26 + matchday}th March 2026`;
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const getMatchesFromSchedule = (teams: Team[]): Match[] => {
src/App.tsx:  return TOURNAMENT_SCHEDULE.map((sm, index) => {
src/App.tsx:    const homeTeam = teams.find(t => t.name === sm.home);
src/App.tsx:    const awayTeam = teams.find(t => t.name === sm.away);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    let homeScore = 0;
src/App.tsx:    let awayScore = 0;
src/App.tsx:    let status: 'scheduled' | 'live' | 'finished' = 'scheduled';
src/App.tsx:    let homeScorers: Scorer[] = [];
src/App.tsx:    let awayScorers: Scorer[] = [];
src/App.tsx:    let homeStats: Match['homeStats'];
src/App.tsx:    let awayStats: Match['awayStats'];
src/App.tsx:    let isDNF = false;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return {
src/App.tsx:      id: `m-${index + 1}`,
src/App.tsx:      matchNumber: sm.matchNumber || index + 1,
src/App.tsx:      matchday: sm.matchday,
src/App.tsx:      leg: sm.leg,
src/App.tsx:      homeTeamId: homeTeam?.id || 'TBD',
src/App.tsx:      awayTeamId: awayTeam?.id || 'TBD',
src/App.tsx:      homeScore,
src/App.tsx:      awayScore,
src/App.tsx:      homeScorers,
src/App.tsx:      awayScorers,
src/App.tsx:      homeStats,
src/App.tsx:      awayStats,
src/App.tsx:      date: getMatchdayDate(sm.matchday),
src/App.tsx:      status: (sm.rescheduled && sm.matchday <= 2) ? 'rescheduled' : status,
src/App.tsx:      type: sm.type,
src/App.tsx:      rescheduled: sm.rescheduled,
src/App.tsx:      isDNF,
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const calculateStandings = (teams: Team[], matches: Match[]): Team[] => {
src/App.tsx:  const standings = teams.map(t => ({ ...t, played: 0, won: 0, drawn: 0, lost: 0, gf: 0, ga: 0, gd: 0, points: 0, form: [] as string[] }));
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // Sort matches by matchNumber to ensure form is chronological
src/App.tsx:  const sortedMatches = [...matches].sort((a, b) => (a.matchNumber || 0) - (b.matchNumber || 0));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  sortedMatches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:    // Determine if this is a league match based on matchday (e.g. 1-10 are league, 11+ are knockout)
src/App.tsx:    const isLeagueMatch = (m.matchday || 0) <= 20; 
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (m.status === 'finished' && isLeagueMatch && m.homeScore !== undefined && m.homeScore !== null && m.awayScore !== undefined && m.awayScore !== null) {
src/App.tsx:      const home = standings.find(t => t.id === m.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:      const away = standings.find(t => t.id === m.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (home && away) {
src/App.tsx:        home.played++;
src/App.tsx:        away.played++;
src/App.tsx:        home.gf += m.homeScore;
src/App.tsx:        home.ga += m.awayScore;
src/App.tsx:        away.gf += m.awayScore;
src/App.tsx:        away.ga += m.homeScore;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (m.homeScore > m.awayScore) {
src/App.tsx:          home.won++;
src/App.tsx:          home.points += 3;
src/App.tsx:          home.form.push('W');
src/App.tsx:          away.lost++;
src/App.tsx:          away.form.push('L');
src/App.tsx:        } else if (m.homeScore < m.awayScore) {
src/App.tsx:          away.won++;
src/App.tsx:          away.points += 3;
src/App.tsx:          away.form.push('W');
src/App.tsx:          home.lost++;
src/App.tsx:          home.form.push('L');
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          home.drawn++;
src/App.tsx:          away.drawn++;
src/App.tsx:          home.points += 1;
src/App.tsx:          home.form.push('D');
src/App.tsx:          away.points += 1;
src/App.tsx:          away.form.push('D');
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        home.gd = home.gf - home.ga;
src/App.tsx:        away.gd = away.gf - away.ga;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // Keep only the last 5 results for form
src/App.tsx:  standings.forEach(t => {
src/App.tsx:    t.form = t.form.slice(-5);
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  return standings.sort((a, b) => b.points - a.points || b.gd - a.gd || b.gf - a.gf);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const formatTimestamp = (ts: any) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!ts) return '';
src/App.tsx:  try {
src/App.tsx:    if (ts && typeof ts === 'object' && 'seconds' in ts) return new Date(ts.seconds * 1000).toLocaleString();
src/App.tsx:    if (ts.toDate && typeof ts.toDate === 'function') return ts.toDate().toLocaleString();
src/App.tsx:    const d = new Date(ts);
src/App.tsx:    return isNaN(d.getTime()) ? '' : d.toLocaleString();
src/App.tsx:  } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:    return '';
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:interface PlayerGoalStats {
src/App.tsx:  playerName: string;
src/App.tsx:  gamerName: string;
src/App.tsx:  gamerFullName: string;
src/App.tsx:  goals: number;
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const calculateStats = (teams: Team[], matches: Match[]): (PlayerGoalStats & { teamId: string })[] => {
src/App.tsx:  const statsMap: Record<string, PlayerGoalStats & { teamId: string }> = {};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  matches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:    if (m.status === 'finished') {
src/App.tsx:      const homeTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === m.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:      const awayTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === m.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (homeTeam && m.homeScorers) {
src/App.tsx:        m.homeScorers.forEach(s => {
src/App.tsx:          const key = `${s.playerName}-${homeTeam.id}`;
src/App.tsx:          if (!statsMap[key]) {
src/App.tsx:            statsMap[key] = {
src/App.tsx:              teamId: homeTeam.id,
src/App.tsx:              playerName: s.playerName,
src/App.tsx:              gamerName: homeTeam.fcName || homeTeam.name,
src/App.tsx:              gamerFullName: homeTeam.fullName,
src/App.tsx:              goals: 0
src/App.tsx:            };
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          statsMap[key].goals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (awayTeam && m.awayScorers) {
src/App.tsx:        m.awayScorers.forEach(s => {
src/App.tsx:          const key = `${s.playerName}-${awayTeam.id}`;
src/App.tsx:          if (!statsMap[key]) {
src/App.tsx:            statsMap[key] = {
src/App.tsx:              teamId: awayTeam.id,
src/App.tsx:              playerName: s.playerName,
src/App.tsx:              gamerName: awayTeam.fcName || awayTeam.name,
src/App.tsx:              gamerFullName: awayTeam.fullName,
src/App.tsx:              goals: 0
src/App.tsx:            };
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          statsMap[key].goals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return Object.values(statsMap).sort((a, b) => b.goals - a.goals);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:interface CleanSheetStats {
src/App.tsx:  teamId: string;
src/App.tsx:  goalkeeperName: string;
src/App.tsx:  gamerName: string;
src/App.tsx:  gamerFullName: string;
src/App.tsx:  cleanSheets: number;
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const calculateCleanSheets = (teams: Team[], matches: Match[]): CleanSheetStats[] => {
src/App.tsx:  const statsMap: Record<string, CleanSheetStats> = {};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  matches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:    if (m.status === 'finished') {
src/App.tsx:      const homeTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === m.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:      const awayTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === m.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (homeTeam && (m.awayScore ?? -1) === 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const key = homeTeam.id;
src/App.tsx:        if (!statsMap[key]) {
src/App.tsx:          statsMap[key] = {
src/App.tsx:            teamId: homeTeam.id,
src/App.tsx:            goalkeeperName: homeTeam.goalkeeper || 'Unknown GK',
src/App.tsx:            gamerName: homeTeam.name,
src/App.tsx:            gamerFullName: homeTeam.fullName,
src/App.tsx:            cleanSheets: 0
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        statsMap[key].cleanSheets += 1;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (awayTeam && (m.homeScore ?? -1) === 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const key = awayTeam.id;
src/App.tsx:        if (!statsMap[key]) {
src/App.tsx:          statsMap[key] = {
src/App.tsx:            teamId: awayTeam.id,
src/App.tsx:            goalkeeperName: awayTeam.goalkeeper || 'Unknown GK',
src/App.tsx:            gamerName: awayTeam.name,
src/App.tsx:            gamerFullName: awayTeam.fullName,
src/App.tsx:            cleanSheets: 0
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        statsMap[key].cleanSheets += 1;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return Object.values(statsMap).sort((a, b) => b.cleanSheets - a.cleanSheets);

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div 
src/App.tsx:      onClick={(e) => {

src/App.tsx:          setVal(match.matchNumber?.toString() || '');
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }}

src/App.tsx:        <input 
src/App.tsx:          autoFocus

src/App.tsx:          value={val}
src/App.tsx:          onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:          onBlur={(e) => {
src/App.tsx:            setIsEditing(false);
src/App.tsx:            const num = parseInt(val);
src/App.tsx:            if (!isNaN(num) && num !== match.matchNumber) {
src/App.tsx:              if (onUpdateMatch) {

src/App.tsx:                });
src/App.tsx:                match.matchNumber = num;
src/App.tsx:              }
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              setVal(match.matchNumber?.toString() || '');
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }}
src/App.tsx:          onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') e.currentTarget.blur(); }}
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:      ) : (

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleSaveScorers = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!updateMatch) return;
src/App.tsx:      setIsSavingScorers(true);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const stringifyScorers = (scorers: any[]) => scorers.map(s => `${s.playerName} (${s.goals} goals, ${s.time || 'no time'})`).join(', ') || 'None';

src/App.tsx:      const newHStr = stringifyScorers(localHomeScorers || []);
src/App.tsx:      if (oldHStr !== newHStr) changesStrs.push(`Home: [${oldHStr}] -> [${newHStr}]`);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const oldAStr = stringifyScorers(match.awayScorers || []);
src/App.tsx:      const newAStr = stringifyScorers(localAwayScorers || []);

src/App.tsx:      const finalChangeStr = changesStrs.length > 0 ? changesStrs.join(' | ') : 'Update scorers (no structure changes)';
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const newEditLogs = match.editLogs ? [...match.editLogs] : [];

src/App.tsx:         newEditLogs.push({
src/App.tsx:           editedBy: myRegistrationData.fcName || currentUser.email || 'Participant',
src/App.tsx:           editedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:           changes: finalChangeStr
src/App.tsx:         });

src/App.tsx:           editedBy: 'Admin',
src/App.tsx:           editedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:           changes: finalChangeStr
src/App.tsx:         });

src/App.tsx:    const addLogAndUpdate = (field: keyof Match, newVal: any, descField?: string) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!updateMatch) return;
src/App.tsx:      const oldVal = match[field];
src/App.tsx:      if (oldVal === newVal) return;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:         editedAt: new Date().toISOString(),

src/App.tsx:      });

src/App.tsx:      const updated = { ...match, [field]: newVal, editLogs: newEditLogs } as Match;
src/App.tsx:      // Also mutate local match object so input doesn't glitch if there is a delay
src/App.tsx:      (match as any)[field] = newVal;
src/App.tsx:      match.editLogs = newEditLogs;
src/App.tsx:      updateMatch(updated);
src/App.tsx:    };

src/App.tsx:  const EditProfileModal = ({

src/App.tsx:    handleUpdateRegistration,

src/App.tsx:    onClose: () => void, 
src/App.tsx:    handleUpdateRegistration: (data: Registration) => Promise<void>, 
src/App.tsx:    isSubmitting: boolean
src/App.tsx:  }) => {
src/App.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:      ...registration,
src/App.tsx:      name: registration.name || '',
src/App.tsx:      age: (registration.age || '').toString(),
src/App.tsx:      fcUid: registration.fcUid || '',

src/App.tsx:      goalkeeper: registration.goalkeeper || '',
src/App.tsx:      logoUrl: registration.logoUrl || ''
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    const [isCompressing, setIsCompressing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleFileChange = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:      const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:      if (!file) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (file.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
src/App.tsx:        alert("File is too large. Please select an image under 10MB.");
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setIsCompressing(true);
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:        reader.onloadend = () => {
src/App.tsx:          setFormData({ ...formData, logoUrl: reader.result as string });
src/App.tsx:          setIsCompressing(false);
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:      } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error("File read error:", error);
src/App.tsx:        alert("Failed to process image. Please try another one.");
src/App.tsx:        setIsCompressing(false);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:      if (isCompressing) return;
src/App.tsx:      await handleUpdateRegistration({
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        age: Number(formData.age),
src/App.tsx:        teamOvr: Number(formData.teamOvr)
src/App.tsx:      } as Registration);
src/App.tsx:      onClose();
src/App.tsx:    };

src/App.tsx:              <div className="space-y-2">
src/App.tsx:                <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40">Full Name</label>

src/App.tsx:  const TeamSearchableSelect = ({ label, value, onChange, teams, placeholder = "Search teammate..." }: { label: string, value: string, onChange: (val: string) => void, teams: Team[], placeholder?: string }) => {
src/App.tsx:    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:    const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:    const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Initial search should be based on the current value if it's already a team name
src/App.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:      const safeTeams = teams || [];
src/App.tsx:      const team = safeTeams.find(t => t.id === value);
src/App.tsx:      if (team) {
src/App.tsx:        setSearch(team.fullName || team.fcName || team.name || '');
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setSearch(value || '');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }, [value, teams]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
src/App.tsx:          setIsOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
src/App.tsx:      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
src/App.tsx:    }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const filteredTeams = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:      const safeTeams = teams || [];
src/App.tsx:      const lowerSearch = (search || '').toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:      const filtered = search ? safeTeams.filter(t => 
src/App.tsx:        (t.fcName?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(lowerSearch) || 
src/App.tsx:        (t.name?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(lowerSearch) ||
src/App.tsx:        (t.fullName?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(lowerSearch)
src/App.tsx:      ) : safeTeams;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Sort alphabetically by full name
src/App.tsx:      return [...filtered].sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        const nameA = a.fullName || a.fcName || a.name || '';
src/App.tsx:        const nameB = b.fullName || b.fcName || b.name || '';
src/App.tsx:        return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    }, [search, teams]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return (
src/App.tsx:      <div className="space-y-2 relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
src/App.tsx:        <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-white/40 tracking-widest">{label}</label>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="relative">
src/App.tsx:          <input 
src/App.tsx:            type="text" 
src/App.tsx:            value={search}
src/App.tsx:            onFocus={() => setIsOpen(true)}
src/App.tsx:            onChange={e => {
src/App.tsx:              setSearch(e.target.value);
src/App.tsx:              onChange(e.target.value);
src/App.tsx:              setIsOpen(true);
src/App.tsx:            }} 
src/App.tsx:            placeholder={placeholder}
src/App.tsx:            className="w-full bg-fc-purple-dark/40 border border-white/10 rounded-[6px] p-3 text-sm text-white focus:border-fc-neon-green/50 outline-none transition-all" 
src/App.tsx:          />
src/App.tsx:          <Search className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/20 pointer-events-none" />
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        <AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:          {isOpen && (filteredTeams.length > 0 || search) && (
src/App.tsx:            <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
src/App.tsx:              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
src/App.tsx:              className="absolute z-[110] left-0 right-0 mt-2 bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 rounded-[6px] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-60 overflow-y-auto"
src/App.tsx:            >
src/App.tsx:              {filteredTeams.length > 0 ? (
src/App.tsx:                filteredTeams.map(team => (
src/App.tsx:                  <button
src/App.tsx:                    key={team.id}
src/App.tsx:                    onClick={() => {
src/App.tsx:                      const displayValue = team.fullName || team.fcName || team.name;
src/App.tsx:                      onChange(team.id);
src/App.tsx:                      setSearch(displayValue);
src/App.tsx:                      setIsOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:                    }}
src/App.tsx:                    className="w-full px-4 py-3 text-left hover:bg-fc-purple-light/30 flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-white/5 last:border-0 transition-colors"
src/App.tsx:                  >
src/App.tsx:                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-[4px] bg-white/5 border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
src/App.tsx:                      {team.logoUrl ? (
src/App.tsx:                        <img src={team.logoUrl} alt="" className="w-full h-full object-cover rounded-[4px]" referrerPolicy="no-referrer" />
src/App.tsx:                      ) : (
src/App.tsx:                        <Star className="w-4 h-4 text-fc-neon-green" />
src/App.tsx:                      )}
src/App.tsx:                    </div>
src/App.tsx:                    <div className="flex-1 truncate">
src/App.tsx:                      <p className="text-xs font-bold text-white truncate">
src/App.tsx:                        {team.fullName || team.fcName || team.name}
src/App.tsx:                      </p>
src/App.tsx:                    </div>
src/App.tsx:                  </button>
src/App.tsx:                ))
src/App.tsx:              ) : (
src/App.tsx:                <div className="p-4 text-center">
src/App.tsx:                  <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white/20 italic">No matching players</p>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              )}
src/App.tsx:            </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:          )}
src/App.tsx:        </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const RegistrationModal = ({ 
src/App.tsx:    onClose, 
src/App.tsx:    handleRegister, 
src/App.tsx:    isSubmitting, 
src/App.tsx:    hasRegistered,
src/App.tsx:    user
src/App.tsx:  }: { 
src/App.tsx:    onClose: () => void, 
src/App.tsx:    handleRegister: (data: any) => void, 
src/App.tsx:    isSubmitting: boolean,
src/App.tsx:    hasRegistered: boolean,
src/App.tsx:    user: User | null
src/App.tsx:  }) => {
src/App.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:      name: '',
src/App.tsx:      age: '',
src/App.tsx:      fcUid: '',
src/App.tsx:      fcName: '',
src/App.tsx:      teamOvr: '',
src/App.tsx:      experience: '',
src/App.tsx:      goalkeeper: '',
src/App.tsx:      logoUrl: ''
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    const [isCompressing, setIsCompressing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleFileChange = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:      const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:      if (!file) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setIsCompressing(true);
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:        reader.onloadend = () => {
src/App.tsx:          setFormData({ ...formData, logoUrl: reader.result as string });
src/App.tsx:          setIsCompressing(false);
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:      } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error("File read error:", error);
src/App.tsx:        setIsCompressing(false);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:      if (isCompressing) {
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      handleRegister({
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        age: Number(formData.age),
src/App.tsx:        teamOvr: Number(formData.teamOvr)
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return (
src/App.tsx:      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
src/App.tsx:        <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:          initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:          animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
src/App.tsx:          exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:          onClick={onClose}
src/App.tsx:          className="absolute inset-0 bg-fc-purple-dark/90 backdrop-blur-xl"
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:        <motion.div
src/App.tsx:          initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
src/App.tsx:          animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:          exit={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
src/App.tsx:          className="relative w-full max-w-lg bg-fc-purple-base border border-white/10 rounded-[12px] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl"
src/App.tsx:        >
src/App.tsx:          <div className="p-6 md:p-8 border-b border-white/5 bg-gradient-to-b from-fc-neon-green/10 to-transparent">
src/App.tsx:            <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4 md:mb-6">
src/App.tsx:              <div>
src/App.tsx:                <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-display font-black italic text-white tracking-tight uppercase leading-none mb-2">Tournament Registration</h2>
src/App.tsx:                <p className="text-fc-neon-green/60 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">Join THE WORLD'S GAME</p>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:              <button 
src/App.tsx:                onClick={onClose}
src/App.tsx:                className="p-2 md:p-3 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-[8px] transition-colors text-white/40 hover:text-white"
src/App.tsx:              >
src/App.tsx:                <X className="w-5 md:w-6 h-5 md:h-6" />
src/App.tsx:              </button>
src/App.tsx:            </div>

src/App.tsx:      const { active, over } = event;
src/App.tsx:      if (over && active.id !== over.id) {
src/App.tsx:        const oldIndex = sortedDates.indexOf(active.id as string);
src/App.tsx:        const newIndex = sortedDates.indexOf(over.id as string);
src/App.tsx:        const newOrder = arrayMove(sortedDates, oldIndex, newIndex) as string[];
src/App.tsx:        await handleUpdateConfig({ ...config, dateOrder: newOrder });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const sortedDates = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:      const allDates = Object.keys(matchesByDay);
src/App.tsx:      if (config.dateOrder && config.dateOrder.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const existingDates = config.dateOrder.filter(d => allDates.includes(d));
src/App.tsx:        const newDates = allDates.filter(d => !config.dateOrder!.includes(d)).sort();
src/App.tsx:        // Use Set to ensure final list has no duplicates
src/App.tsx:        return Array.from(new Set([...existingDates, ...newDates]));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return allDates.sort();
src/App.tsx:    }, [matchesByDay, config.dateOrder]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const moveDateLabel = async (date: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
src/App.tsx:      const allDates = sortedDates;
src/App.tsx:      const index = allDates.indexOf(date);
src/App.tsx:      if (index < 0) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (direction === 'up' && index === 0) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (direction === 'down' && index === allDates.length - 1) return;
src/App.tsx:      const newIndex = direction === 'up' ? index - 1 : index + 1;
src/App.tsx:      const newOrder = arrayMove(allDates, index, newIndex) as string[];
src/App.tsx:      await handleUpdateConfig({ ...config, dateOrder: newOrder });
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const toggleDateVisibility = async (date: string) => {
src/App.tsx:      const currentHidden = config.hiddenDates || [];
src/App.tsx:      const isHidden = currentHidden.includes(date);
src/App.tsx:      let newHidden = [...currentHidden];
src/App.tsx:      if (isHidden) {
src/App.tsx:        newHidden = newHidden.filter(d => d !== date);
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        newHidden.push(date);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      await handleUpdateConfig({ ...config, hiddenDates: newHidden });
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const SortableDateItem = ({ date, index, total, matchLabels, updateMatchLabel, isHidden }: { date: string, index: number, total: number, matchLabels: Record<string, string>, updateMatchLabel: (date: string, status: string) => Promise<void>, isHidden: boolean, key?: any }) => {

src/App.tsx:      const style = { transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform), transition, zIndex: isDragging ? 50 : 'auto', position: 'relative' as any };
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:const fetchWithCache = async (cacheKey: string, queryRef: any, isDoc: boolean = false, ttlMs: number = 2000) => {
src/App.tsx:  const cached = localStorage.getItem(cacheKey);
src/App.tsx:  const cachedTimeStr = localStorage.getItem(`${cacheKey}_time`);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  if (cached && cachedTimeStr) {
src/App.tsx:    if (Date.now() - Number(cachedTimeStr) < ttlMs) {
src/App.tsx:      return JSON.parse(cached);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  try {
src/App.tsx:    let data;
src/App.tsx:    if (isDoc) {
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDoc(queryRef);
src/App.tsx:      if (snap.exists()) data = { id: snap.id, ...(snap.data() as any) };
src/App.tsx:      else data = null;
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(queryRef);
src/App.tsx:      data = snap.docs.map((doc: any) => ({ id: doc.id, ...(doc.data() as any) }));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      localStorage.setItem(cacheKey, JSON.stringify(data));
src/App.tsx:      localStorage.setItem(`${cacheKey}_time`, Date.now().toString());
src/App.tsx:    } catch(e) {}
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return data;
src/App.tsx:  } catch (error: any) {
src/App.tsx:    if ((error.code === 'resource-exhausted' || error.message?.includes('Quota') || error.message?.includes('offline'))) {
src/App.tsx:      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('quotaExceeded'));
src/App.tsx:      if (cached) return JSON.parse(cached);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    throw error;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:};

src/App.tsx:// Helper to parse dates like "4th May 2026"

src/App.tsx:  if (!dStr || dStr === 'TBD') return new Date(0);
src/App.tsx:  const cleanStr = dStr.replace(/(\d+)(st|nd|rd|th)/, '$1');

src/App.tsx:  const matches = useMemo(() => dbMatches, [dbMatches]);
src/App.tsx:  const hofStats = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const monthMatches = matches;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const totalGoals = monthMatches.reduce((acc, m) => acc + (m.homeScore || 0) + (m.awayScore || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:    const totalMatches = monthMatches.filter(m => m.status === 'finished').length;
src/App.tsx:    const avgGoals = totalMatches > 0 ? (totalGoals / totalMatches).toFixed(2) : '0.00';
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Find top scorer for the month
src/App.tsx:    const playerGoals: { [key: string]: { goals: number, gamer: string } } = {};
src/App.tsx:    monthMatches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:      [...(m.homeScorers || []), ...(m.awayScorers || [])].forEach(s => {
src/App.tsx:        if (!playerGoals[s.playerName]) {
src/App.tsx:          const team = teams.find(t => t.id === (m.homeScorers?.includes(s) ? m.homeTeamId : m.awayTeamId));
src/App.tsx:          playerGoals[s.playerName] = { goals: 0, gamer: team?.name || 'Unknown' };
src/App.tsx:        }

src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const topScorer = Object.entries(playerGoals)
src/App.tsx:      .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b.goals - a.goals)[0];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Team Stats
src/App.tsx:    const teamStats: { [key: string]: { 
src/App.tsx:      goalsScored: number, 
src/App.tsx:      goalsConceded: number, 
src/App.tsx:      possession: number, 
src/App.tsx:      fouls: number, 
src/App.tsx:      offsides: number, 
src/App.tsx:      shots: number, 
src/App.tsx:      shotsOnTarget: number,
src/App.tsx:      matches: number,
src/App.tsx:      earlyGoals: number,
src/App.tsx:      lateGoals: number
src/App.tsx:    } } = {};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    monthMatches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:      if (m.status === 'finished') {
src/App.tsx:        const hId = m.homeTeamId;
src/App.tsx:        const aId = m.awayTeamId;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (!teamStats[hId]) teamStats[hId] = { goalsScored: 0, goalsConceded: 0, possession: 0, fouls: 0, offsides: 0, shots: 0, shotsOnTarget: 0, matches: 0, earlyGoals: 0, lateGoals: 0 };
src/App.tsx:        if (!teamStats[aId]) teamStats[aId] = { goalsScored: 0, goalsConceded: 0, possession: 0, fouls: 0, offsides: 0, shots: 0, shotsOnTarget: 0, matches: 0, earlyGoals: 0, lateGoals: 0 };
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].goalsScored += (m.homeScore || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].goalsConceded += (m.awayScore || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].possession += (m.homeStats?.possession || 50);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].fouls += (m.homeStats?.fouls || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].offsides += (m.homeStats?.offsides || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].shots += (m.homeStats?.shots || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].shotsOnTarget += (m.homeStats?.shotsOnTarget || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[hId].matches += 1;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Early/Late tracking
src/App.tsx:        (m.homeScorers || []).forEach(s => {
src/App.tsx:          const t = parseInt(s.time || "0");
src/App.tsx:          if (t > 0 && t <= 30) teamStats[hId].earlyGoals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:          if (t >= 60) teamStats[hId].lateGoals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].goalsScored += (m.awayScore || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].goalsConceded += (m.homeScore || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].possession += (m.awayStats?.possession || 50);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].fouls += (m.awayStats?.fouls || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].offsides += (m.awayStats?.offsides || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].shots += (m.awayStats?.shots || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].shotsOnTarget += (m.awayStats?.shotsOnTarget || 0);
src/App.tsx:        teamStats[aId].matches += 1;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Early/Late tracking
src/App.tsx:        (m.awayScorers || []).forEach(s => {
src/App.tsx:          const t = parseInt(s.time || "0");
src/App.tsx:          if (t > 0 && t <= 30) teamStats[aId].earlyGoals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:          if (t >= 60) teamStats[aId].lateGoals += s.goals;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const getTopTeam = (key: keyof typeof teamStats[string], mode: 'max' | 'min' = 'max') => {
src/App.tsx:      const filteredTeams = Object.entries(teamStats).filter(([_, s]) => s.matches > 0);
src/App.tsx:      if (filteredTeams.length === 0) return { name: '---', value: 0 };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      return filteredTeams
src/App.tsx:        .map(([id, stats]) => {
src/App.tsx:          const team = teams.find(t => t.id === id);
src/App.tsx:          let value = stats[key] as number;
src/App.tsx:          if (key === 'possession') value = value / stats.matches;
src/App.tsx:          return { name: team?.name || 'Unknown', value };
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:        .sort((a, b) => mode === 'max' ? b.value - a.value : a.value - b.value)[0];
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return { 
src/App.tsx:      totalGoals, 
src/App.tsx:      totalMatches, 
src/App.tsx:      avgGoals, 
src/App.tsx:      topScorer: topScorer ? { name: topScorer[0], ...topScorer[1] } : null,
src/App.tsx:      mostPossession: getTopTeam('possession'),

src/App.tsx:  const handleAnalyzeQualification = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!isAdmin) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const K = 8;
src/App.tsx:      const remainingMatches: Record<string, number> = {};
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      INITIAL_TEAMS.forEach(t => {
src/App.tsx:         let played = 0;
src/App.tsx:         matches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:            if (m.matchday && m.matchday < 5 && m.status === 'finished') {
src/App.tsx:               if (m.homeTeamId === t.id || m.awayTeamId === t.id) played++;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:         });
src/App.tsx:         let totalFixtures = 0;
src/App.tsx:         matches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:            if (m.matchday && m.matchday < 5 && (m.homeTeamId === t.id || m.awayTeamId === t.id)) totalFixtures++;
src/App.tsx:         });
src/App.tsx:         remainingMatches[t.id] = totalFixtures - played;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const currentStandings = calculateStandings(INITIAL_TEAMS, matches);
src/App.tsx:      // Sort to determine current ranks
src/App.tsx:      currentStandings.sort((a, b) => b.points - a.points || b.gd - a.gd || b.gf - a.gf);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const statuses: Record<string, string> = {};
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      currentStandings.forEach(t => {
src/App.tsx:         const currentPoints = t.points;
src/App.tsx:         const maxPoints = currentPoints + (remainingMatches[t.id] * 3);
src/App.tsx:         
src/App.tsx:         const otherTeamsMaxPoints = currentStandings
src/App.tsx:             .filter(other => other.id !== t.id)
src/App.tsx:             .map(other => other.points + (remainingMatches[other.id] * 3))
src/App.tsx:             .sort((a, b) => b - a);
src/App.tsx:             
src/App.tsx:         const eighthBestOther = otherTeamsMaxPoints[K - 1];
src/App.tsx:         
src/App.tsx:         if (currentPoints > eighthBestOther) {
src/App.tsx:             statuses[t.id] = 'Q';
src/App.tsx:         } else {
src/App.tsx:             const currentEighthPoints = currentStandings[K - 1]?.points || 0;
src/App.tsx:             if (maxPoints < currentEighthPoints) {
src/App.tsx:                 statuses[t.id] = 'E';
src/App.tsx:             }
src/App.tsx:         }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await setDoc(doc(db, 'config', 'qualification'), { statuses });
src/App.tsx:      await refreshCache('cache_qual');
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Qualification analysis failed:", error);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const EditableImage = ({ id, defaultSrc, alt, className = "", isAdmin }: any) => {
src/App.tsx:    const data = siteContent[id] || {};
src/App.tsx:    // Fallback carefully: if it has imageUrl, use it. If it has content, use it. Else default.
src/App.tsx:    const src = data.imageUrl || data.content || defaultSrc;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const handleUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:      const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:      if (!file) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) return alert("Image must be under 2MB");
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:      reader.onloadend = async () => {
src/App.tsx:        const base64 = reader.result as string;
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          await updateSiteContent(id, base64, true);
src/App.tsx:        } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:          console.error("Failed to upload image:", err);
src/App.tsx:          alert("Failed to update image");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (isAdmin && isEditingMode) {
src/App.tsx:      return (
src/App.tsx:        <div className={`relative group ${className}`}>
src/App.tsx:          <img src={src} alt={alt} referrerPolicy="no-referrer" className={`w-full h-full object-cover`} />
src/App.tsx:          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-fc-purple-dark/50 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 flex items-center justify-center transition-opacity cursor-pointer">
src/App.tsx:             <label className="bg-fc-neon-green text-black px-4 py-2 rounded-[6px] text-black text-xs font-black uppercase cursor-pointer hover:bg-fc-neon-green text-black transition-colors">
src/App.tsx:               Change Image
src/App.tsx:               <input type="file" accept="image/*" onChange={handleUpload} className="hidden" />
src/App.tsx:             </label>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return <img src={src} alt={alt} referrerPolicy="no-referrer" className={className} />;
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:      setTempContent(isImage ? imageUrl : text);
src/App.tsx:    }, [text, imageUrl, isImage]);

src/App.tsx:    const handleSave = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!isAdmin) return;
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        await updateSiteContent(id, tempContent, isImage);
src/App.tsx:        setIsEditing(false);
src/App.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error("Save failed:", err);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (isEditing && isAdmin) {
src/App.tsx:      return (
src/App.tsx:        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 group/edit-mode">
src/App.tsx:          <input 
src/App.tsx:            type="text"

src/App.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setTempContent(e.target.value)}

src/App.tsx:            autoFocus
src/App.tsx:            placeholder={isImage ? "Image URL" : "Text"}

src/App.tsx:              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleSave();
src/App.tsx:              if (e.key === 'Escape') setIsEditing(false);
src/App.tsx:            }}
src/App.tsx:          />
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
src/App.tsx:            <button onClick={handleSave} className="p-1 bg-green-500 rounded text-black hover:bg-green-400">
src/App.tsx:              <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
src/App.tsx:            </button>
src/App.tsx:            <button onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="p-1 bg-red-500 rounded text-white hover:bg-red-400">
src/App.tsx:              <X className="w-3 h-3" />
src/App.tsx:            </button>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:        {isImage ? (

src/App.tsx:        ) : (
src/App.tsx:          <Component>{text}</Component>
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:        {isAdmin && isEditingMode && (

src/App.tsx:            onClick={(e) => {
src/App.tsx:              e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:              e.stopPropagation();
src/App.tsx:              setTempContent(isImage ? imageUrl : text);
src/App.tsx:              setIsEditing(true);
src/App.tsx:            }}
src/App.tsx:            className="p-1.5 bg-fc-neon-green text-black hover:bg-fc-neon-green text-black rounded-[4px] text-black transition-all scale-75 absolute -right-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-[100] shadow-xl border border-fc-neon-green/40"
src/App.tsx:            title={isImage ? "Edit Image" : "Edit Text"}
src/App.tsx:          >

src/App.tsx:          </button>

src/App.tsx:  const cleanDocData = (data: any) => {
src/App.tsx:    const result: any = {};
src/App.tsx:    Object.keys(data).forEach(key => {
src/App.tsx:      if (key.startsWith('_')) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (data[key] === undefined) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (data[key] && typeof data[key] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data[key])) {
src/App.tsx:        result[key] = cleanDocData(data[key]);
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        result[key] = data[key];
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return result;
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAddNewFixture = async (fixtureDataOrDay?: { date: string, home: string, away: string } | string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!isAdmin) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    let date = '';
src/App.tsx:    let homePlayer = '';
src/App.tsx:    let awayPlayer = '';
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (typeof fixtureDataOrDay === 'string') {
src/App.tsx:      // Open modal with pre-filled date
src/App.tsx:      setAddMatchInitialData({ date: fixtureDataOrDay, home: '', away: '' });
src/App.tsx:      setIsAddMatchModalOpen(true);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    } else if (fixtureDataOrDay && typeof fixtureDataOrDay === 'object') {
src/App.tsx:      // Modal save logic
src/App.tsx:      date = fixtureDataOrDay.date || 'TBD';
src/App.tsx:      homePlayer = fixtureDataOrDay.home || 'TBD';
src/App.tsx:      awayPlayer = fixtureDataOrDay.away || 'TBD';
src/App.tsx:      setIsAddMatchModalOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      // Global add button logic: open the modal with default
src/App.tsx:      setAddMatchInitialData({ date: '2026-05-TBD', home: '', away: '' });
src/App.tsx:      setIsAddMatchModalOpen(true);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const matchId = `match-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}`;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Calculate where to insert and shift match numbers
src/App.tsx:      // We sort matches globally: by date, then matchNumber
src/App.tsx:      const sortedMatches = [...matches].sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (a.date !== b.date) return (a.date || '').localeCompare(b.date || '');
src/App.tsx:        return (a.matchNumber || 0) - (b.matchNumber || 0);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Find the first match that should come AFTER this one
src/App.tsx:      // We'll put it at the end of the matches for that specific date
src/App.tsx:      let insertIndex = sortedMatches.length;
src/App.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < sortedMatches.length; i++) {
src/App.tsx:        // If we found a date that is strictly GREATER than our new date, we insert BEFORE it
src/App.tsx:        if ((sortedMatches[i].date || '').localeCompare(date) > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          insertIndex = i;
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const newMatchNumber = insertIndex + 1;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let homeId = '';
src/App.tsx:      let awayId = '';
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (homePlayer && homePlayer !== 'TBD') {
src/App.tsx:        const team = dbTeams.find(t => 
src/App.tsx:          t.id === homePlayer ||
src/App.tsx:          t.name?.toLowerCase() === homePlayer.toLowerCase() || 
src/App.tsx:          t.fullName?.toLowerCase() === homePlayer.toLowerCase() ||
src/App.tsx:          t.fcName?.toLowerCase() === homePlayer.toLowerCase()
src/App.tsx:        );
src/App.tsx:        homeId = team ? team.id : homePlayer;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (awayPlayer && awayPlayer !== 'TBD') {
src/App.tsx:        const team = dbTeams.find(t => 
src/App.tsx:          t.id === awayPlayer ||
src/App.tsx:          t.name?.toLowerCase() === awayPlayer.toLowerCase() || 
src/App.tsx:          t.fullName?.toLowerCase() === awayPlayer.toLowerCase() ||
src/App.tsx:          t.fcName?.toLowerCase() === awayPlayer.toLowerCase()
src/App.tsx:        );
src/App.tsx:        awayId = team ? team.id : awayPlayer;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const newMatch: Match = {
src/App.tsx:        id: matchId,
src/App.tsx:        matchNumber: newMatchNumber,
src/App.tsx:        date: date,
src/App.tsx:        status: 'scheduled',
src/App.tsx:        homeTeamId: homeId,
src/App.tsx:        awayTeamId: awayId,
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Prepare batch update to shift other matches
src/App.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/App.tsx:      batch.set(doc(db, 'matches', matchId), newMatch);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const shiftedMatches = sortedMatches.slice(insertIndex).map((m, idx) => ({
src/App.tsx:        ...m,
src/App.tsx:        matchNumber: newMatchNumber + idx + 1
src/App.tsx:      }));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      shiftedMatches.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:        batch.update(doc(db, 'matches', m.id), { matchNumber: m.matchNumber });
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Optimistic state update
src/App.tsx:      setDbMatches(prev => {
src/App.tsx:        const updated = prev.map(m => {
src/App.tsx:          const shifted = shiftedMatches.find(sm => sm.id === m.id);
src/App.tsx:          return shifted ? { ...m, matchNumber: shifted.matchNumber } : m;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        return [...updated, newMatch];
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:      await refreshCache('matches');
src/App.tsx:    } catch(err) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Error adding match:", err);
src/App.tsx:      alert('Error adding new fixture.');
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const refreshCache = async (type: 'matches' | 'teams' | 'bracket' | 'config' | 'site_content' | 'cache_qual') => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      if (type === 'matches') {
src/App.tsx:        const data = await fetchWithCache('cache_matches', collection(db, 'matches'), false, 30000);
src/App.tsx:        setDbMatches(data);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (type === 'teams') {
src/App.tsx:        const teamsData = await fetchWithCache('cache_teams', query(collection(db, 'registrations'), where('status', '==', 'approved')), false, 30000);
src/App.tsx:        const teamsList: Team[] = teamsData.map((data: any) => ({
src/App.tsx:          id: data.id, name: data.fcName, shortName: data.fcName.substring(0, 3).toUpperCase(),
src/App.tsx:          fullName: data.name, fcName: data.fcName, ovr: data.teamOvr, uid: data.fcUid,
src/App.tsx:          logoUrl: data.logoUrl, goalkeeper: data.goalkeeper, played: 0, won: 0, drawn: 0, lost: 0, gf: 0, ga: 0, gd: 0, points: 0, form: []
src/App.tsx:        }));
src/App.tsx:        setDbTeams(teamsList);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (type === 'bracket') {
src/App.tsx:         const q = query(collection(db, 'bracket'));
src/App.tsx:         const bracketDataMap: Record<string, BracketMatch> = {};
src/App.tsx:         const snapshot = await fetchWithCache('cache_bracket', q, false, 0);
src/App.tsx:         snapshot.forEach((data: any) => { bracketDataMap[data.id] = data; });
src/App.tsx:         setBracket(Object.values(bracketDataMap));
src/App.tsx:      } else if (type === 'config') {
src/App.tsx:         const data = await fetchWithCache('cache_config', doc(db, 'config', 'system'), true, 0);
src/App.tsx:         if (data) setConfig(data as Config);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (type === 'site_content') {
src/App.tsx:         const q = query(collection(db, 'site_content'));
src/App.tsx:         const data = await fetchWithCache('cache_site_content', q, false, 600000);
src/App.tsx:         const content: Record<string, any> = {};
src/App.tsx:         data.forEach((docData: any) => { content[docData.id] = docData; });
src/App.tsx:         setSiteContent(content);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (type === 'cache_qual') {
src/App.tsx:         const docSnap = await fetchWithCache('cache_qual', doc(db, 'config', 'qualification'), true, 600000);
src/App.tsx:         if (docSnap?.statuses) setQualificationStatus(docSnap.statuses);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Error refreshing cache:", e);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdateMatch = async (match: Match) => {
src/App.tsx:    const isParticipant = user && (match.homeTeamId === user.uid || match.awayTeamId === user.uid);
src/App.tsx:    if (!isAdmin && !isParticipant) {
src/App.tsx:       alert("Permission denied. Only admins or match participants can update results.");
src/App.tsx:       return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const cleanedData = cleanDocData(match);
src/App.tsx:      setDbMatches(prev => prev.map(m => m.id === match.id ? { ...m, ...cleanedData } as Match : m));
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'matches', match.id), cleanedData);
src/App.tsx:      await refreshCache('matches');
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Call achievements after match saved
src/App.tsx:      if (cleanedData.status === 'finished' && user?.uid) {
src/App.tsx:        const homeT = dbTeams.find(t => t.id === match.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:        const awayT = dbTeams.find(t => t.id === match.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          await checkAndAwardAchievements(
src/App.tsx:            {
src/App.tsx:              homeScore: cleanedData.homeScore,
src/App.tsx:              awayScore: cleanedData.awayScore,
src/App.tsx:              homeScorers: cleanedData.homeScorers || [],
src/App.tsx:              awayScorers: cleanedData.awayScorers || [],
src/App.tsx:              homeTeam: homeT?.fcName || '', 
src/App.tsx:              awayTeam: awayT?.fcName || '',
src/App.tsx:            },
src/App.tsx:            user.uid,
src/App.tsx:            (user.uid === match.homeTeamId ? match.awayTeamId : match.homeTeamId) || ''
src/App.tsx:          );
src/App.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:          console.warn('Achievement check failed:', e);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (cleanedData.status === 'finished') {
src/App.tsx:        const homeT = dbTeams.find(t => t.id === match.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:        const awayT = dbTeams.find(t => t.id === match.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:        const enrichedMatchData = {
src/App.tsx:          ...cleanedData,
src/App.tsx:          homePlayer: homeT?.name || homeT?.fcName,
src/App.tsx:          awayPlayer: awayT?.name || awayT?.fcName
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        fetch('/api/generate-news', {
src/App.tsx:          method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:            matchData: enrichedMatchData,
src/App.tsx:            leagueTable: null, // Could map team names to their standings here if we wanted
src/App.tsx:            trigger: 'match-updated'
src/App.tsx:          })
src/App.tsx:        }).catch(e => console.error("News trigger failed:", e));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Error updating match:", error);
src/App.tsx:      alert("Failed to update match.");
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const seedBracket = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!isAdmin) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const bSnap = await getDocs(collection(db, 'bracket'));
