src/App.tsx:  const handleAdminAiCommand = async (command: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // Send the available teams to the AI so it can properly resolve their IDs
src/App.tsx:      const teamsContext = teams.map(t => ({ id: t.id, name: t.name, fcName: t.fcName }));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const response = await fetch('/api/admin-ai-command', {
src/App.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({ command, teams: teamsContext })
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const result = await response.json();
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (!result.success) {
src/App.tsx:        throw new Error(result.message || 'AI failed to process command.');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Process the commands returned by the backend
src/App.tsx:      const commands = result.commands;
src/App.tsx:      for (const cmd of commands) {
src/App.tsx:        if (cmd.type === 'UPDATE_MATCH' || cmd.type === 'ADD_MATCH' || cmd.type === 'CREATE_MATCH') {
src/App.tsx:          const homeTeam = teams.find(t => 
src/App.tsx:            t.id === cmd.data.homeTeamId ||
src/App.tsx:            t.name.toLowerCase() === cmd.data.homeTeamId?.toLowerCase() || 
src/App.tsx:            t.fcName.toLowerCase() === cmd.data.homeTeamId?.toLowerCase()
src/App.tsx:          );
src/App.tsx:          const awayTeam = teams.find(t => 
src/App.tsx:            t.id === cmd.data.awayTeamId ||
src/App.tsx:            t.name.toLowerCase() === cmd.data.awayTeamId?.toLowerCase() || 
src/App.tsx:            t.fcName.toLowerCase() === cmd.data.awayTeamId?.toLowerCase()
src/App.tsx:          );
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          cmd.data.homeTeamId = homeTeam?.id || cmd.data.homeTeamId;
src/App.tsx:          cmd.data.awayTeamId = awayTeam?.id || cmd.data.awayTeamId;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const matchId = cmd.data.matchId || `m-${Date.now()}`;
src/App.tsx:          const cleanedData = cleanDocData({
src/App.tsx:            homeTeamId: cmd.data.homeTeamId,
src/App.tsx:            awayTeamId: cmd.data.awayTeamId,
src/App.tsx:            homeScore: cmd.data.homeScore || 0,
src/App.tsx:            awayScore: cmd.data.awayScore || 0,
src/App.tsx:            status: cmd.data.status || 'scheduled',
src/App.tsx:            date: cmd.data.date,
src/App.tsx:            matchNumber: cmd.data.matchNumber || 1,
src/App.tsx:            matchday: cmd.data.matchday || 1,
src/App.tsx:            ...cmd.data,
src/App.tsx:            id: matchId,
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:          await setDoc(doc(db, 'matches', matchId), cleanedData, { merge: true });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (cmd.type === 'RESET') {
src/App.tsx:          await handleAdminReset(cmd.data.type);
src/App.tsx:        } else if (cmd.type === 'UPDATE_CONTENT') {
src/App.tsx:          await updateSiteContent(cmd.data.elementId, cmd.data.text, cmd.data.isImage);
src/App.tsx:        } else if (cmd.type === 'APPROVE_REGISTRATION') {
src/App.tsx:          await handleApproveRegistration(cmd.data.registrationId);
src/App.tsx:        } else if (cmd.type === 'REJECT_REGISTRATION') {
src/App.tsx:          await handleRejectRegistration(cmd.data.registrationId);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      alert("AI Assistant successfully processed your request.");
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("AI Error:", error);
src/App.tsx:      alert(`AI Assistant failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}`);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const compressImage = (file: File): Promise<string> => {
src/App.tsx:    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
src/App.tsx:      const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:      reader.onload = (e) => {
src/App.tsx:        const img = new Image();
src/App.tsx:        img.onload = () => {
src/App.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/App.tsx:          let width = img.width;
src/App.tsx:          let height = img.height;
src/App.tsx:          const maxDim = 800;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          if (width > height && width > maxDim) {
src/App.tsx:            height = Math.round((height * maxDim) / width);
src/App.tsx:            width = maxDim;
src/App.tsx:          } else if (height > maxDim) {
src/App.tsx:            width = Math.round((width * maxDim) / height);
src/App.tsx:            height = maxDim;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/App.tsx:          canvas.height = height;
src/App.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:          if (!ctx) return reject(new Error('Canvas context unavailable'));
src/App.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7);
src/App.tsx:          resolve(dataUrl.split(',')[1]);
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        img.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Image load failed'));
src/App.tsx:        img.src = e.target?.result as string;
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('FileReader error'));
src/App.tsx:      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const checkAndAwardAchievements = async (matchData: any, currentUserId: string, opponentUserId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    const { homeScore, awayScore, homeScorers, awayScorers, homeTeam, awayTeam } = matchData;
src/App.tsx:    const currentUserAchievements: string[] = [];
src/App.tsx:    const opponentAchievements: string[] = [];
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Helper to get minutes
src/App.tsx:    const getMinutes = (scorers: any[]) => scorers?.flatMap(s => String(s.time || '').split(',').map(t => parseInt(t.trim().replace("'", ""))).filter(t => !isNaN(t))) || [];
src/App.tsx:    const homeMinutes = getMinutes(homeScorers);
src/App.tsx:    const awayMinutes = getMinutes(awayScorers);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Determine who is who
src/App.tsx:    const isCurrentUserHome = myRegistrationData?.fcName && homeTeam?.toLowerCase().includes(myRegistrationData.fcName.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:    const myScore = isCurrentUserHome ? homeScore : awayScore;
src/App.tsx:    const oppScore = isCurrentUserHome ? awayScore : homeScore;
src/App.tsx:    const myMinutes = isCurrentUserHome ? homeMinutes : awayMinutes;
src/App.tsx:    const oppMinutes = isCurrentUserHome ? awayMinutes : homeMinutes;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (myRegistrationData?.fcName) {
src/App.tsx:      if (myScore > oppScore) currentUserAchievements.push('first_blood');
src/App.tsx:      if (oppScore === 0 && myScore > 0) currentUserAchievements.push('clean_sheet_king');
src/App.tsx:      if (myScore === 0 && oppScore > 0) opponentAchievements.push('clean_sheet_king');
src/App.tsx:      if (myScore >= 5) opponentAchievements.push('goalkeepers_nightmare');
src/App.tsx:      if (oppScore >= 5) currentUserAchievements.push('goalkeepers_nightmare');
src/App.tsx:      if (myScore >= 3 && oppScore >= 3) {
src/App.tsx:        currentUserAchievements.push('thriller');
src/App.tsx:        opponentAchievements.push('thriller');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Scorers logic
src/App.tsx:      const myScorers = isCurrentUserHome ? homeScorers : awayScorers;
src/App.tsx:      const oppScorers = isCurrentUserHome ? awayScorers : homeScorers;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      myScorers?.forEach((s: any) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (s.goals >= 3) currentUserAchievements.push('hat_trick_hero');
src/App.tsx:        if (s.goals >= 5) currentUserAchievements.push('sniper');
src/App.tsx:        if (s.playerName?.includes('(OG)')) currentUserAchievements.push('uno_reversed');
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      oppScorers?.forEach((s: any) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (s.playerName?.includes('(OG)')) opponentAchievements.push('uno_reversed');
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (oppMinutes?.some((m: number) => m >= 90)) {
src/App.tsx:        currentUserAchievements.push('heartbreak_90');
src/App.tsx:        currentUserAchievements.push('last_minute_hero');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      if (myMinutes?.some((m: number) => m >= 90)) {
src/App.tsx:        opponentAchievements.push('heartbreak_90');
src/App.tsx:        opponentAchievements.push('last_minute_hero');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (myMinutes?.includes(67)) currentUserAchievements.push('lover_67');
src/App.tsx:      if (myMinutes?.includes(69)) currentUserAchievements.push('lover_69');
src/App.tsx:      if (oppMinutes?.includes(67)) opponentAchievements.push('lover_67');
src/App.tsx:      if (oppMinutes?.includes(69)) opponentAchievements.push('lover_69');
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const updateAchievements = async (userId: string, achievements: string[]) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!userId) return;
src/App.tsx:      if (!isAdmin && userId !== currentUserId) return; // Non-admins cannot update other users
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const updates: any = {};
src/App.tsx:        achievements.forEach(id => {
src/App.tsx:          updates[`achievements.${id}`] = { unlockedAt: serverTimestamp(), seen: false };
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'users', userId), updates);
src/App.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:        console.warn("Could not update achievements:", e);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    await updateAchievements(currentUserId, currentUserAchievements);
src/App.tsx:    if (opponentUserId) await updateAchievements(opponentUserId, opponentAchievements);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const processMatchResultImage = async (file: File, playerRegistration: Registration) => {
src/App.tsx:    setIsSubmittingImg(true);
src/App.tsx:    setAiAnalysisResult(null);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const base64 = await compressImage(file);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const response = await fetch('/api/analyze-match', {
src/App.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:          base64,
src/App.tsx:          mimeType: 'image/jpeg',
src/App.tsx:          fcName: playerRegistration.fcName,
src/App.tsx:          homeGoalkeeper: teams.find(t => t.fcName === playerRegistration.fcName)?.goalkeeper,
src/App.tsx:          awayGoalkeeper: teams.find(t => t.fcName !== playerRegistration.fcName)?.goalkeeper
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const resData = await response.json();
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (!resData.success) {
src/App.tsx:        setAiAnalysisResult(`REJECTED: ${resData.message || 'Failed to analyze'}`);
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const data = resData.matchData;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const normalize = (nm: string) => (nm || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
src/App.tsx:      const userFcName = normalize(playerRegistration.fcName);
src/App.tsx:      const aiTeam1 = normalize(data.team1);
src/App.tsx:      const aiTeam2 = normalize(data.team2);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const isParticipant = aiTeam1.includes(userFcName) || userFcName.includes(aiTeam1) || 
src/App.tsx:                          aiTeam2.includes(userFcName) || userFcName.includes(aiTeam2);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!isParticipant) {
src/App.tsx:        setAiAnalysisResult(`REJECTED: User not matched. Your FC Name "${playerRegistration.fcName}" was not clearly detected in the screenshot (AI saw: "${data.team1}" vs "${data.team2}").`);
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Achievement processing
src/App.tsx:      const opponentAiNameRaw = aiTeam1.includes(userFcName) || userFcName.includes(aiTeam1) ? data.team2 : data.team1;
src/App.tsx:      const opponentAiName = normalize(opponentAiNameRaw);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let opponentReg: Registration | undefined;
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const opponentSnap = await getDocs(query(collection(db, 'registrations'), where('fcName', '==', opponentAiNameRaw), where('status', '==', 'approved')));
src/App.tsx:        if (!opponentSnap.empty) {
src/App.tsx:            opponentReg = opponentSnap.docs[0]?.data() as Registration;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:        console.warn("Could not fetch opponent registration:", e);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Find user's team
src/App.tsx:      const userTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === user!.uid || normalize(t.fcName) === userFcName || normalize(t.name) === userFcName);
src/App.tsx:      if (!userTeam) {
src/App.tsx:        setAiAnalysisResult(`ERROR: Could not find your team in the active tournament.`);
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Find all matches where userTeam is a participant
src/App.tsx:      const userMatches = matches.filter(m => m.homeTeamId === userTeam.id || m.awayTeamId === userTeam.id);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Rank matching matches
src/App.tsx:      let bestMatch: Match | null = null;
src/App.tsx:      let bestOpponentTeam: Team | null = null;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Define display status logic inside processing to align with UI expectations
src/App.tsx:      const getDisplayStatus = (m: Match) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (m.status === 'finished') return 'finished';
src/App.tsx:        const label = matchLabels[m.date];
src/App.tsx:        return label || m.status;
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // 1. Intelligent matching: ONLY look for matches that are labeled as ongoing/live
src/App.tsx:      const ongoingMatches = userMatches.filter(m => {
src/App.tsx:          const ds = getDisplayStatus(m);
src/App.tsx:          return ds === 'ongoing' || ds === 'live';
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (ongoingMatches.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          // If multiple ongoing, try to find the one matching the AI opponent name
src/App.tsx:          if (ongoingMatches.length === 1) {
src/App.tsx:              bestMatch = ongoingMatches[0];
src/App.tsx:              const opponentId = bestMatch.homeTeamId === userTeam.id ? bestMatch.awayTeamId : bestMatch.homeTeamId;
src/App.tsx:              bestOpponentTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === opponentId) || null;
src/App.tsx:          } else {
src/App.tsx:              for (const m of ongoingMatches) {
src/App.tsx:                  const opponentId = m.homeTeamId === userTeam.id ? m.awayTeamId : m.homeTeamId;
src/App.tsx:                  const oppTeam = teams.find(t => t.id === opponentId);
src/App.tsx:                  if (!oppTeam) continue;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                  const oppNormName = normalize(oppTeam.name);
src/App.tsx:                  const oppNormFcName = normalize(oppTeam.fcName);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                  if (oppNormName === opponentAiName || oppNormFcName === opponentAiName ||
src/App.tsx:                      oppNormName.includes(opponentAiName) || opponentAiName.includes(oppNormName) ||
src/App.tsx:                      oppNormFcName.includes(opponentAiName) || opponentAiName.includes(oppNormFcName)) {
src/App.tsx:                      bestMatch = m;
src/App.tsx:                      bestOpponentTeam = oppTeam;
src/App.tsx:                      break;
src/App.tsx:                  }
src/App.tsx:              }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!bestMatch || !bestOpponentTeam) {
src/App.tsx:          setAiAnalysisResult(`ERROR: No ONGOING match found for you against "${opponentAiNameRaw}". Only matches marked as "Ongoing" by an admin can be analyzed.`);
src/App.tsx:          return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const team1 = aiTeam1.includes(userFcName) || userFcName.includes(aiTeam1) ? userTeam : bestOpponentTeam;
src/App.tsx:      const team2 = aiTeam1.includes(userFcName) || userFcName.includes(aiTeam1) ? bestOpponentTeam : userTeam;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const existingMatch = bestMatch;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (existingMatch) {
src/App.tsx:          // Prevent overwriting finished results unless admin
src/App.tsx:          if (existingMatch.status === 'finished' && !isAdmin) {
src/App.tsx:            setAiAnalysisResult("REJECTED: Match finalized. This result is already officially recorded. If there is an error, please contact a tournament administrator.");
src/App.tsx:            return;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // 3. Status logic check
src/App.tsx:          const effectiveStatus = getDisplayStatus(existingMatch);
src/App.tsx:          if (effectiveStatus !== 'ongoing' && effectiveStatus !== 'live') {
src/App.tsx:            setAiAnalysisResult(`REJECTED: This match (vs ${bestOpponentTeam.name}) is currently "${effectiveStatus}". AI Analysis can only be performed on "Ongoing" matches. Please wait for an admin to start your match.`);
src/App.tsx:            return;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // 4. Winner check
src/App.tsx:          const winnerTeam = data.team1Score > data.team2Score ? team1 : (data.team1Score < data.team2Score ? team2 : null);
src/App.tsx:          if (winnerTeam && !isAdmin) {
src/App.tsx:             const isWinnerReporter = normalize(winnerTeam.fcName) === userFcName || 
src/App.tsx:                                     normalize(winnerTeam.name) === userFcName ||
src/App.tsx:                                     normalize(winnerTeam.fullName).includes(userFcName);
src/App.tsx:             if (!isWinnerReporter) {
src/App.tsx:                setAiAnalysisResult(`REJECTED: Your are not the match winner. Only the winning team (${winnerTeam.name}) is allowed to upload the final results.`);
src/App.tsx:                return;
src/App.tsx:             }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const matchRef = doc(db, 'matches', existingMatch.id);
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          const t1Score = Number(data.team1Score ?? data.homeScore ?? 0);
src/App.tsx:          const t2Score = Number(data.team2Score ?? data.awayScore ?? 0);
src/App.tsx:          const safeScorers = data.scorers || data.goalScorers || data.goal_scorers || data.goalScorer || [];
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          const isT1 = (t?: string) => {
src/App.tsx:            if (!t) return false;
src/App.tsx:            const normT = normalize(t);
src/App.tsx:            return normT === 'team1' || normT === normalize(data.team1);
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:          const isT2 = (t?: string) => {
src/App.tsx:            if (!t) return false;
src/App.tsx:            const normT = normalize(t);
src/App.tsx:            return normT === 'team2' || normT === normalize(data.team2);
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          const parseScorers = (filterFn: (t?: string) => boolean) => 
src/App.tsx:            safeScorers
src/App.tsx:              .filter((s:any) => {
src/App.tsx:                 let sTeam = s.team;
src/App.tsx:                 if (!sTeam) {
src/App.tsx:                    if (t1Score > 0 && t2Score === 0) sTeam = 'team1';
src/App.tsx:                    else if (t2Score > 0 && t1Score === 0) sTeam = 'team2';
src/App.tsx:                 }
src/App.tsx:                 return s && (filterFn(sTeam) || filterFn === undefined);
src/App.tsx:              })
src/App.tsx:              .map((s:any) => ({ 
src/App.tsx:                playerName: s.name || s.playerName || 'Unknown', 
src/App.tsx:                goals: Number(s.goals) || 1, 
src/App.tsx:                time: (s.minute !== undefined ? String(s.minute) : s.time) || null 
src/App.tsx:              }));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const buildStats = (s: any) => s ? {
src/App.tsx:              possession: Number(s.possession ?? 50),
src/App.tsx:              shots: Number(s.shots ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:              shotsOnTarget: Number(s.shotsOnTarget ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:              passAccuracy: Number(s.passAccuracy ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:              fouls: Number(s.fouls ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:              offsides: Number(s.offsides ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:              saves: Number(s.saves ?? 0),
src/App.tsx:          } : null;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const t1Stats = buildStats(data.team1Stats ?? data.homeStats);
src/App.tsx:          const t2Stats = buildStats(data.team2Stats ?? data.awayStats);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const isTeam1ActuallyDbHome = existingMatch.homeTeamId === team1.id;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          let finalMOTM = data.manOfTheMatch;
src/App.tsx:          if (!finalMOTM) {
src/App.tsx:             const allPlayers = parseScorers(() => true);
src/App.tsx:             if (allPlayers.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:                 const bestPlayer = [...allPlayers].sort((a,b) => b.goals - a.goals)[0];
src/App.tsx:                 finalMOTM = bestPlayer.playerName;
src/App.tsx:             }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const updatePayload = {
src/App.tsx:            homeScore: isTeam1ActuallyDbHome ? t1Score : t2Score,
src/App.tsx:            awayScore: isTeam1ActuallyDbHome ? t2Score : t1Score,
src/App.tsx:            status: 'finished',
src/App.tsx:            homeScorers: isTeam1ActuallyDbHome ? parseScorers(isT1) : parseScorers(isT2),

src/App.tsx:            awayStats: isTeam1ActuallyDbHome ? t2Stats : t1Stats,

src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Deep clean payload to guarantee no undefined values or internal fields throw a Firestore error

src/App.tsx:          }

src/App.tsx:          await refreshCache('matches');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Call achievements after match saved
src/App.tsx:          if (cleanedPayload.status === 'finished' && user?.uid) {
src/App.tsx:            try {
src/App.tsx:              await checkAndAwardAchievements(
src/App.tsx:                {
src/App.tsx:                  homeScore: cleanedPayload.homeScore,
src/App.tsx:                  awayScore: cleanedPayload.awayScore,
src/App.tsx:                  homeScorers: cleanedPayload.homeScorers || [],
src/App.tsx:                  awayScorers: cleanedPayload.awayScorers || [],

src/App.tsx:                user.uid,
src/App.tsx:                opponentReg?.userId || ''
src/App.tsx:              );
src/App.tsx:            } catch (e) {

src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          if (cleanedPayload.status === 'finished') {

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:  const handleRegister = async (regData: Omit<Registration, 'id' | 'userId' | 'timestamp' | 'status'>) => {

src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsub();
src/App.tsx:  }, [user]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Auto-sync local user achievements based on match data
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!user || !userProfile || !myRegistrationData || !teams.length || !matches.length) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Use setTimeout so we don't blast firestore repeatedly on fast state changes
src/App.tsx:    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
src/App.tsx:      const myTeam = teams.find(t => t.fcName === myRegistrationData.fcName);
src/App.tsx:      if (!myTeam) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const earnedIds = evaluateAchievements(myTeam, matches, myRegistrationData);
src/App.tsx:      const existingIds = new Set(Object.keys(userProfile.achievements || {}));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const missingIds = earnedIds.filter(id => !existingIds.has(id));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (missingIds.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const newAchievements: any = {};
src/App.tsx:        missingIds.forEach(id => {
src/App.tsx:          newAchievements[id] = {
src/App.tsx:            unlockedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/App.tsx:            seen: false
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        const updatedAchievements = { ...userProfile.achievements, ...newAchievements };
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Update user profile in firestore to grant the achievement
src/App.tsx:        setDoc(doc(db, 'users', user.uid), { achievements: updatedAchievements }, { merge: true }).catch(err => {
src/App.tsx:          console.error("Failed to auto-grant achievement:", err);
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }, 1000);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/App.tsx:  }, [user, userProfile, myRegistrationData, teams, matches]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCloseAchievement = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (newAchievements.length === 0 || !userProfile) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const updatedAchievements = { ...userProfile.achievements };
src/App.tsx:      newAchievements.forEach(id => {
src/App.tsx:        if (updatedAchievements[id]) {
src/App.tsx:          updatedAchievements[id].seen = true;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const userRef = doc(db, 'users', userProfile.uid);
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(userRef, { achievements: updatedAchievements });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setUserProfile(prev => prev ? { ...prev, achievements: updatedAchievements } : null);
src/App.tsx:      setNewAchievements([]);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Failed to mark achievement as seen:", e);
src/App.tsx:      setNewAchievements([]);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (u) => {
src/App.tsx:      setUser(u);
src/App.tsx:      if (u && !u.isAnonymous) {
src/App.tsx:        // Ensure user profile document exists
src/App.tsx:        const userRef = doc(db, 'users', u.uid);
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          const snap = await getDoc(userRef);
src/App.tsx:          if (!snap.exists()) {

src/App.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:          console.warn("Failed to ensure user profile:", e);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      if (!u) {
src/App.tsx:        // user logged out
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Initialize a persistent voter ID in this browser
src/App.tsx:    if (!localStorage.getItem('voter_id')) {
src/App.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('voter_id', uuidv4());
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Voting listeners removed
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const copyToClipboard = (uid: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!uid) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // Fallback for better compatibility in iframes
src/App.tsx:      const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
src/App.tsx:      textArea.value = uid;
src/App.tsx:      textArea.style.position = "fixed";
src/App.tsx:      textArea.style.left = "-9999px";
src/App.tsx:      textArea.style.top = "0";
src/App.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(textArea);
src/App.tsx:      textArea.focus();
src/App.tsx:      textArea.select();
src/App.tsx:      document.execCommand("copy");
src/App.tsx:      document.body.removeChild(textArea);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Modern API
src/App.tsx:      if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
src/App.tsx:        navigator.clipboard.writeText(uid).catch(() => {});
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setCopiedId(uid);
src/App.tsx:      setTimeout(() => setCopiedId(null), 2000);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Failed to copy: ", err);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const matchesByDay = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const grouped: Record<string, Match[]> = {};
src/App.tsx:    const filtered = searchTerm 
src/App.tsx:      ? matches.filter(m => {
src/App.tsx:          const home = teams.find(t => t.id === m.homeTeamId);
src/App.tsx:          const away = teams.find(t => t.id === m.awayTeamId);
src/App.tsx:          const search = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:          return home?.name.toLowerCase().includes(search) || 
src/App.tsx:                 home?.fullName.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
src/App.tsx:                 home?.fcName.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
src/App.tsx:                 away?.name.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
src/App.tsx:                 away?.fullName.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
src/App.tsx:                 away?.fcName.toLowerCase().includes(search);
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:      : matches;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    filtered.forEach(m => {
src/App.tsx:      const dateKey = m.date || 'TBD';
src/App.tsx:      if (!grouped[dateKey]) grouped[dateKey] = [];
src/App.tsx:      grouped[dateKey].push(m);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Sort matches within each day by matchNumber
src/App.tsx:    Object.keys(grouped).forEach(day => {
src/App.tsx:      grouped[day].sort((a, b) => a.matchNumber - b.matchNumber);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Helper to get IST date string
src/App.tsx:    const getISTDate = () => {
src/App.tsx:      const d = new Date();
src/App.tsx:      const istOffset = 5.5 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
src/App.tsx:      const istDate = new Date(d.getTime() + istOffset);
src/App.tsx:      const day = istDate.getUTCDate();
src/App.tsx:      const month = istDate.toLocaleString('en-US', { month: 'long', timeZone: 'UTC' });
src/App.tsx:      const year = istDate.getUTCFullYear();
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const daySuffix = (n: number) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (n > 3 && n < 21) return 'th';
src/App.tsx:        switch (n % 10) {
src/App.tsx:          case 1:  return "st";
src/App.tsx:          case 2:  return "nd";
src/App.tsx:          case 3:  return "rd";
src/App.tsx:          default: return "th";
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      return `${day}${daySuffix(day)} ${month} ${year}`;
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const todayIST = getISTDate();
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const sortedDays = Object.keys(grouped).sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:       const timeA = parseTourneyDate(a).getTime();
src/App.tsx:       const timeB = parseTourneyDate(b).getTime();
src/App.tsx:       
src/App.tsx:       if (isNaN(timeA) || isNaN(timeB)) {
src/App.tsx:         return a.localeCompare(b);
src/App.tsx:       }
src/App.tsx:       return timeA - timeB;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const finalGrouped: Record<string, Match[]> = {};
src/App.tsx:    sortedDays.forEach(day => {
src/App.tsx:      finalGrouped[day] = grouped[day];
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return finalGrouped;
src/App.tsx:  }, [matches, searchTerm, teams]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const firstUpcomingDay = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const parseDate = (dStr: string) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!dStr || dStr === 'TBD') return new Date(0);
src/App.tsx:      const cleanStr = dStr.replace(/(\d+)(st|nd|rd|th)/, '$1');
src/App.tsx:      return new Date(cleanStr);
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const days = Object.keys(matchesByDay).sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:      const timeA = parseDate(a).getTime();
src/App.tsx:      const timeB = parseDate(b).getTime();
src/App.tsx:      return timeA - timeB;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return days.find(day => matchesByDay[day].some(m => m.status !== 'finished'));

firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:             data.uid is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.email is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.role in ['admin', 'user'];
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['id', 'round', 'homeTeamName', 'awayTeamName']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.round is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.homeTeamName is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.awayTeamName is string &&
firestore.rules:             (!('homeScore' in data) || data.homeScore is number) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('awayScore' in data) || data.awayScore is number);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidRegistration(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['userId', 'fcName', 'fcUid', 'name', 'status', 'timestamp', 'age', 'teamOvr', 'experience']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.userId == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.fcUid is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.fcName is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.status in ['pending', 'approved', 'rejected'] &&
firestore.rules:             // Removed strict equality check on server time to allow serverTimestamp() to process
firestore.rules:             data.age is number &&
firestore.rules:             data.teamOvr is number &&
firestore.rules:             data.experience is string;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidMatch(data) {
firestore.rules:      return (!('id' in data) || data.id is string) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('homeTeamId' in data) || data.homeTeamId is string) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('awayTeamId' in data) || data.awayTeamId is string) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('status' in data) || data.status in ['scheduled', 'upcoming', 'live', 'ongoing', 'finished', 'rescheduled', 'postponed']) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('date' in data) || data.date is string) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('matchNumber' in data) || data.matchNumber is number);
firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:      allow read: if true;

analyze.js:    standings[home].played++;
analyze.js:    standings[away].played++;

analyze.js:    standings[away].ga += homeScore;
analyze.js:
analyze.js:    if (homeScore > awayScore) {
analyze.js:      standings[home].won++;
analyze.js:      standings[home].points += 3;
analyze.js:      standings[away].lost++;
analyze.js:    } else if (homeScore < awayScore) {
analyze.js:      standings[away].won++;
analyze.js:      standings[away].points += 3;
analyze.js:      standings[home].lost++;
analyze.js:    } else {
analyze.js:      standings[home].drawn++;
analyze.js:      standings[away].drawn++;
analyze.js:      standings[home].points += 1;
analyze.js:      standings[away].points += 1;
analyze.js:    }
analyze.js:  }
analyze.js:});
analyze.js:
analyze.js:Object.keys(standings).forEach(t => {
analyze.js:  standings[t].gd = standings[t].gf - standings[t].ga;
analyze.js:});

analyze.js:  if (b.points !== a.points) return b.points - a.points;
analyze.js:  if (b.gd !== a.gd) return b.gd - a.gd;
analyze.js:  return b.gf - a.gf;
analyze.js:});

count_tags.py:import re
count_tags.py:
count_tags.py:def count_tags(file_path):
count_tags.py:    with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
count_tags.py:        content = f.read()
count_tags.py:    
count_tags.py:    opens = re.findall(r'<div(?![a-zA-Z])', content)
count_tags.py:    closes = re.findall(r'</div>', content)
count_tags.py:    
count_tags.py:    m_opens = re.findall(r'<motion\.div(?![a-zA-Z])', content)
count_tags.py:    m_closes = re.findall(r'</motion\.div>', content)
count_tags.py:    
count_tags.py:    print(f"div opens: {len(opens)}")
count_tags.py:    print(f"div closes: {len(closes)}")
count_tags.py:    print(f"motion.div opens: {len(m_opens)}")
count_tags.py:    print(f"motion.div closes: {len(m_closes)}")
count_tags.py:    
count_tags.py:    # Simple stack trace
count_tags.py:    stack = []
count_tags.py:    lines = content.split('\n')
count_tags.py:    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
count_tags.py:        # This is very crude but might find the first unbalanced line
count_tags.py:        for match in re.finditer(r'<(div|motion\.div)|</(div|motion\.div)>', line):
count_tags.py:            tag = match.group(0)
count_tags.py:            if tag.startswith('</'):
count_tags.py:                if not stack:
count_tags.py:                    print(f"Excess closing tag {tag} at line {i+1}")
count_tags.py:                else:
count_tags.py:                    stack.pop()
count_tags.py:            else:
count_tags.py:                if not tag.endswith('/>'):
count_tags.py:                    stack.append((tag, i+1))
count_tags.py:    
count_tags.py:    if stack:
count_tags.py:        print(f"Unclosed tags at end: {len(stack)}")
count_tags.py:        for tag, line in stack[-5:]:
count_tags.py:            print(f"  {tag} opened at line {line}")
count_tags.py:
count_tags.py:count_tags('src/App.tsx')

server.ts:async function sendTelegramMatchResult(matchData: any, imageBase64: string, mimeType: string) {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
server.ts:    const chatId = process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID;
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (!botToken || !chatId) {
server.ts:      console.log('[Telegram] Missing credentials, skipping');
server.ts:      return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const caption = `
server.ts:🎮 *New Match Result!*
server.ts:
server.ts:⚽ *${matchData.homePlayer || matchData.team1 || 'Home'}* ${matchData.homeScore ?? matchData.team1Score ?? 0} - ${matchData.awayScore ?? matchData.team2Score ?? 0} *${matchData.awayPlayer || matchData.team2 || 'Away'}*
server.ts:
server.ts:📅 Matchday: ${matchData.matchday || 'N/A'}
server.ts:🏆 MOTM: ${matchData.manOfTheMatch || 'N/A'}
server.ts:
server.ts:⚽ *Scorers:*
server.ts:${[...(matchData.homeScorers || matchData.team1Scorers || []), ...(matchData.awayScorers || matchData.team2Scorers || [])]
server.ts:  .map((s: any) => `• ${s.playerName || s.name} (${s.goals} goal${s.goals > 1 ? 's' : ''})`)
server.ts:  .join('\n') || 'No scorers recorded'}
server.ts:
server.ts:🕐 ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata' })} IST
server.ts:    `.trim();
server.ts:
server.ts:    const imageBuffer = Buffer.from(imageBase64, 'base64');
server.ts:    const ext = mimeType.split('/')[1] || 'jpg';
server.ts:    const boundary = '----TelegramBoundary' + Date.now();
server.ts:
server.ts:    const header = [
server.ts:      `--${boundary}`,
server.ts:      `Content-Disposition: form-data; name="chat_id"`,
server.ts:      '',
server.ts:      chatId,
server.ts:      `--${boundary}`,
server.ts:      `Content-Disposition: form-data; name="parse_mode"`,
server.ts:      '',
server.ts:      'Markdown',
server.ts:      `--${boundary}`,
server.ts:      `Content-Disposition: form-data; name="caption"`,
server.ts:      '',
server.ts:      caption,
server.ts:      `--${boundary}`,
server.ts:      `Content-Disposition: form-data; name="photo"; filename="match.${ext}"`,
server.ts:      `Content-Type: ${mimeType}`,
server.ts:      '',
server.ts:      ''
server.ts:    ].join('\r\n');
server.ts:
server.ts:    const footer = `\r\n--${boundary}--`;
server.ts:    const body = Buffer.concat([
server.ts:      Buffer.from(header, 'utf8'),
server.ts:      imageBuffer,
server.ts:      Buffer.from(footer, 'utf8')
server.ts:    ]);
server.ts:
server.ts:    const response = await fetch(
server.ts:      `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendPhoto`,
server.ts:      {
server.ts:        method: 'POST',
server.ts:        headers: {
server.ts:          'Content-Type': `multipart/form-data; boundary=${boundary}`,
server.ts:          'Content-Length': body.length.toString()
server.ts:        },
server.ts:        body
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    );
server.ts:
server.ts:    const result = await response.json();
server.ts:    if (result.ok) {
server.ts:      console.log('[Telegram] ✅ Sent successfully');
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.error('[Telegram] ❌ Failed:', result.description);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error('[Telegram] Error:', e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}

server.ts:        model: config.model,
server.ts:        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: "Respond with only the word 'OK' if you can read this." }]
server.ts:      });

server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, message: `Connected to ${config.model} successfully! AI response: ${text}`, source: config.source });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {

server.ts:  // AI Endpoint for match analysis
server.ts:  app.post("/api/analyze-match", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { base64, mimeType, fcName, homeGoalkeeper, awayGoalkeeper } = req.body;
server.ts:      const config = await getAiConfig();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      console.log(`[AI] Analysis Request | Model: ${config.model} | Source: ${config.source}`);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (!config.key) throw new Error("GROQ_API_KEY is not configured.");
server.ts:
server.ts:      const groq = new Groq({ apiKey: config.key });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const response = await groq.chat.completions.create({
server.ts:        model: config.model,
server.ts:        messages: [
server.ts:          {
server.ts:            role: "user",
server.ts:            content: [
server.ts:              {
server.ts:                type: "image_url",
server.ts:                image_url: { url: `data:${mimeType};base64,${base64}` }
server.ts:              },
server.ts:              {
server.ts:                type: "text",
server.ts:                text: `Analyze this FC Mobile match result screenshot. The player reporting this is named "${fcName}".
server.ts:                
server.ts:                CONTEXT:
server.ts:                - Home Team Goalkeeper: ${homeGoalkeeper || "Not specified"}
server.ts:                - Away Team Goalkeeper: ${awayGoalkeeper || "Not specified"}
server.ts:
server.ts:                INSTRUCTIONS:
server.ts:                1. USERNAME DETECTION (CRITICAL):
server.ts:                   - Home player username = large bold text TOP LEFT of screen.
server.ts:                   - Away player username = large bold Latin text TOP RIGHT of screen.
server.ts:                   - IGNORE all subtitle text below usernames (team names, league names, Cyrillic text, "NO LEAGUE" etc.).
server.ts:                   - The username is ALWAYS Latin alphabet, never Cyrillic. 
server.ts:                   - Examples: "brokenaqua", "Icebear" — NOT "збірна України 3", "KOLKATA MASTERS", or "NO LEAGUE".
server.ts:                2. Identify the TWO TEAM NAMES ("team1" for Left, "team2" for Right) using the usernames detected above.
server.ts:                3. Identify the Final Score in the middle. team1Score is Left, team2Score is Right.
server.ts:                4. Extract GOAL SCORERS:
server.ts:                   - In EAFC/FIFA match facts, there's usually a unified timeline on the RIGHT side indicating who scored. 
server.ts:                   - Scan the entire screen to identify ANY player names accompanied by a Goal icon (soccer ball) and a minute (e.g. 18').
server.ts:                   - FOLLOW THE CRITICAL SCORER ASSIGNMENT RULES BELOW.
server.ts:                5. Extract Match Stats: Possession, Shots, Shots on Target, Pass Accuracy, Fouls, Offsides, Saves.
server.ts:                   - For "Shots (On Goal)" like "6(6)": 'shots' is 6, 'shotsOnTarget' is 6.
server.ts:                   - Left-side values = "team1Stats".
server.ts:                   - Right-side values = "team2Stats".
server.ts:                6. MAN OF THE MATCH (MOTM): Look at the player ratings or for a player highlighted with a Star Icon or "MVP". Assign their name to "manOfTheMatch". IF NOT EXPLICITLY SHOWN, just pick the player with the most goals from the winning team (if they scored multiple goals). Otherwise, leave it as null.
server.ts:                
server.ts:                CRITICAL SCORER ASSIGNMENT RULES:
server.ts:                1. The scorers list on the RIGHT SIDE of the screen belongs to BOTH teams combined (unified timeline).
server.ts:                2. You MUST figure out which goal belongs to which team by using the FINAL SCORE as truth:
server.ts:                   - If team1Score is 3, exactly 3 goals must be assigned to team1 in the scorers list.
server.ts:                   - If team2Score is 2, exactly 2 goals must be assigned to team2 in the scorers list.
server.ts:                   - Total scorers must always add up to the correct score.
server.ts:                3. Goals are listed in TIME ORDER (earliest first) — NOT grouped by team.
server.ts:                4. To assign a goal to the correct team, use the running score logic if possible, or context clues.
server.ts:                5. NEVER assign more goals to a team than their final score.
server.ts:                6. If unsure which team scored a goal, assign it to the team that still needs goals to reach their final score.
server.ts:                7. team1 = the LEFT side player (home), team2 = the RIGHT side player (away).
server.ts:                8. Double check: count team1 scorers = team1Score, count team2 scorers = team2Score.
server.ts:
server.ts:                CRITICAL RULES:
server.ts:                - ALWAYS USE STRICTLY "team1" OR "team2" in the "team" field of each scorer.
server.ts:                - Ensure "team1Score" matches the total number of goals in the "team1" scorers list.
server.ts:                - One team must match or contain "${fcName}".
server.ts:                
server.ts:                Return JSON in this exact structure, ONLY the raw JSON object, no markdown, no backticks, no explanation.
server.ts:                CRITICAL: The "scorers" array must have ALL goals assigned.
server.ts:                { 
server.ts:                  "team1": "string", "team2": "string", 
server.ts:                  "team1Score": number, "team2Score": number, 
server.ts:                  "scorers": [{ "name": "string", "team": "team1"|"team2", "minute": number, "goals": 1 }],
server.ts:                  "team1Stats": { "possession": number, "shots": number, "shotsOnTarget": number, "passAccuracy": number, "fouls": number, "offsides": number, "saves": number },
server.ts:                  "team2Stats": { "possession": number, "shots": number, "shotsOnTarget": number, "passAccuracy": number, "fouls": number, "offsides": number, "saves": number },
server.ts:                  "manOfTheMatch": "string"
server.ts:                }`
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        ]
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const raw = response.choices[0]?.message?.content || "{}";
server.ts:      const clean = raw.replace(/```json|```/g, "").trim();
server.ts:      const resultParsed = JSON.parse(clean);
server.ts:      console.log("AI Match Analysis Output:", JSON.stringify(resultParsed, null, 2));
server.ts:      if (resultParsed.error) {
server.ts:          throw new Error(resultParsed.error);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const matchData = resultParsed.matchData || resultParsed;
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Achievement Logic
server.ts:      const checkAndAwardAchievements = async (playerFcName: string, data: any) => {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const { data: regSnapshot } = await supabase.from('documents')
server.ts:            .select('id, data')
server.ts:            .eq('collection', 'registrations')
server.ts:            .eq('data->>fcName', playerFcName)
server.ts:            .limit(1);
server.ts:          
server.ts:          if (!regSnapshot || regSnapshot.length === 0) return null;
server.ts:          const regDoc = regSnapshot[0].data;
server.ts:          const userId = regDoc.userId;
server.ts:          const { data: userDoc } = await supabase.from('documents').select('id, data').eq('collection', 'users').eq('id', userId).single();
server.ts:          const userData = userDoc?.data || { achievements: {} };
server.ts:          const unlockedIds = new Set(Object.keys(userData.achievements || {}));
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const newAchievements: string[] = [];
server.ts:          const award = (id: string) => {
server.ts:            if (!unlockedIds.has(id)) {
server.ts:              newAchievements.push(id);
server.ts:              unlockedIds.add(id);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          };
server.ts:
server.ts:          const isTeam1 = (data.team1?.toLowerCase().includes(playerFcName.toLowerCase()) || playerFcName?.toLowerCase().includes(data.team1?.toLowerCase()));
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const playerStats = isTeam1 ? data.team1Stats : data.team2Stats;
server.ts:          const oppStats = isTeam1 ? data.team2Stats : data.team1Stats;
server.ts:          const playerScore = isTeam1 ? (data.team1Score ?? 0) : (data.team2Score ?? 0);
server.ts:          const oppScore = isTeam1 ? (data.team2Score ?? 0) : (data.team1Score ?? 0);
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const allScorers = data.scorers || [];
server.ts:          const playerTeamKey = isTeam1 ? 'team1' : 'team2';
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const normalizeTeam = (t: string) => (t || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
server.ts:          const playerScorers = allScorers.filter((s:any) => normalizeTeam(s.team) === normalizeTeam(playerTeamKey));
server.ts:          const oppScorers = allScorers.filter((s:any) => normalizeTeam(s.team) !== normalizeTeam(playerTeamKey));
server.ts:
server.ts:          // Logic
server.ts:          if (playerScore > oppScore) {
server.ts:             award('first_blood');
server.ts:             if (oppScore === 0) award('clean_sheet_king');
server.ts:             if (playerScore >= 3 && oppScore >= 3) award('thriller');
server.ts:          } else if (playerScore === oppScore) {
server.ts:             if (playerScore >= 3) award('thriller');
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (oppScore >= 5) award('goalkeeper_nightmare');
server.ts:
server.ts:          // Group player scorers by name for goal-count achievements
server.ts:          const groupedPlayerScorers: Record<string, { totalGoals: number, name: string }> = {};
server.ts:          playerScorers.forEach((s: any) => {
server.ts:            const name = s.name || s.playerName || 'Unknown';
server.ts:            if (!groupedPlayerScorers[name]) {
server.ts:              groupedPlayerScorers[name] = { totalGoals: 0, name };
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            groupedPlayerScorers[name].totalGoals += Number(s.goals || 1);
server.ts:          });
server.ts:
server.ts:          Object.values(groupedPlayerScorers).forEach((ps: any) => {
server.ts:            if (ps.totalGoals >= 3) award('hat_trick_hero');
server.ts:            if (ps.totalGoals >= 5) award('sniper');
server.ts:          });
server.ts:
server.ts:          playerScorers.forEach((s: any) => {
server.ts:            if (s.name && s.name.includes('(OG)')) award('uno_reversed');
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const times = (s.minute !== undefined ? [s.minute] : String(s.time || '').split(',').map((t:string) => parseInt(t.trim().replace("'", "")))).filter(t => !isNaN(Number(t))).map(t => Number(t));
server.ts:            times.forEach((t:number) => {
server.ts:              if (t >= 90) award('last_minute_hero');
server.ts:              if (t === 67) award('lover_67');
server.ts:              if (t === 69) award('lover_69');
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          });
server.ts:
server.ts:          oppScorers.forEach((s: any) => {
server.ts:            const times = (s.minute !== undefined ? [s.minute] : String(s.time || '').split(',').map((t:string) => parseInt(t.trim().replace("'", "")))).filter(t => !isNaN(Number(t))).map(t => Number(t));
server.ts:            times.forEach((t:number) => {
server.ts:              if (t >= 90) award('heartbreak_90');
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          });
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (playerStats && playerStats.saves >= 10) award('spider_man');
server.ts:          if (oppStats && oppStats.shotsOnTarget !== undefined && oppStats.shotsOnTarget === 0) award('fort_knox');
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (newAchievements.length > 0) {
server.ts:            const nextAchievements = { ...(userData.achievements || {}) };
server.ts:            newAchievements.forEach(id => {
server.ts:               nextAchievements[id] = {
server.ts:                 unlockedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:                 seen: false
server.ts:               };
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            await supabase.from('documents').update({ data: { ...userData, achievements: nextAchievements } })
server.ts:               .eq('collection', 'users').eq('id', userId);
server.ts:            return newAchievements;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          return [];
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:          console.error("Error in checkAndAwardAchievements:", e);
server.ts:          return [];
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Process for both participants
server.ts:      await checkAndAwardAchievements(fcName, matchData);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const opponentName = (matchData.team1?.toLowerCase().includes(fcName.toLowerCase()) || fcName.toLowerCase().includes(matchData.team1?.toLowerCase()))
server.ts:        ? matchData.team2
server.ts:        : matchData.team1;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (opponentName) {
server.ts:        await checkAndAwardAchievements(opponentName, matchData);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      let publicImageUrl = null;
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const ext = (mimeType && mimeType.includes('png')) ? 'png' : 'jpg';
server.ts:        const fileName = `report_${Date.now()}_${crypto.randomUUID()}.${ext}`;
server.ts:        const buffer = Buffer.from(base64, 'base64');
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Attempt upload
server.ts:        let { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage.from('match-evidence').upload(fileName, buffer, {
server.ts:          contentType: mimeType || 'image/jpeg',
server.ts:          upsert: false
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (uploadError && uploadError.message.includes('Bucket not found')) {
server.ts:            await supabase.storage.createBucket('match-evidence', { public: true });
server.ts:            const retry = await supabase.storage.from('match-evidence').upload(fileName, buffer, {
server.ts:                contentType: mimeType || 'image/jpeg', upsert: false
server.ts:            });
server.ts:            uploadError = retry.error;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (!uploadError) {
server.ts:           const { data: publicUrlData } = supabase.storage.from('match-evidence').getPublicUrl(fileName);
server.ts:           publicImageUrl = publicUrlData.publicUrl;
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:           console.error("Upload error:", uploadError);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (err) {
server.ts:        console.error("Storage upload exception:", err);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log('[Telegram] Sending match result...');
server.ts:      await sendTelegramMatchResult(matchData, base64, mimeType);
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Save report for admin review
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const reportData = {
server.ts:          matchData: {
server.ts:            ...matchData,
server.ts:            reporterName: fcName || 'Unknown Player'
server.ts:          },
server.ts:          reporterName: fcName || 'Unknown Player',
server.ts:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:          imageUrl: publicImageUrl,   // Store URL instead of raw base64
server.ts:          mimeType: mimeType || 'image/jpeg',
server.ts:          matchId: matchData.matchId || null,
server.ts:          analysisSummary: `Verified match between ${matchData.team1} and ${matchData.team2} (Reported by ${fcName || 'Unknown'})`
server.ts:        };
server.ts:        await supabase.from('documents').insert({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), collection: 'reports', data: reportData });
server.ts:      } catch (saveError) {
server.ts:        console.error("Failed to save report to database:", saveError);
server.ts:        // Don't fail the whole request just because report saving failed
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, matchData, evidenceUrl: publicImageUrl });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("AI Error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: error.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // AI Endpoint for Admin Commands
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin-ai-command", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { command, teams } = req.body;
server.ts:      const config = await getAiConfig();
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log(`[AI] Admin Command | Model: ${config.model} | Source: ${config.source}`);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (!config.key) throw new Error("GROQ_API_KEY is not configured.");
server.ts:
server.ts:      const groq = new Groq({ apiKey: config.key });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const teamsStr = teams && Array.isArray(teams) 
server.ts:          ? teams.map((t: any) => `ID: "${t.id}", Names: ["${t.name}", "${t.fcName}"]`).join(' | ')
server.ts:          : 'No teams available';
server.ts:
server.ts:      const response = await groq.chat.completions.create({
server.ts:        model: config.model,
server.ts:        messages: [
server.ts:          {
server.ts:            role: "user",
server.ts:            content: `You are a Tournament Data Extractor AI. You must return ONLY a JSON array of commands.
server.ts:              Each command must be an object with "type" and "data" keys.
server.ts:              
server.ts:              Today's date is ${new Date().toDateString()}.
server.ts:
server.ts:              Registered Teams Reference (Find the Team ID by looking at the name or fcName):
server.ts:              ${teamsStr}
server.ts:
server.ts:              IF THE USER ASKS TO CREATE/SET MATCHES, FOR EVERY MATCH MENTIONED, OUTPUT:
server.ts:              { 
server.ts:                "type": "UPDATE_MATCH", 
server.ts:                "data": { 
server.ts:                  "matchId": "generate_unique_string_like_match-12345", 
server.ts:                  "homeTeamId": "EXACT TEAM ID FROM REFERENCE LIST", 
server.ts:                  "awayTeamId": "EXACT TEAM ID FROM REFERENCE LIST", 
server.ts:                  "homeScore": 0, 
server.ts:                  "awayScore": 0, 
server.ts:                  "status": "scheduled", 
server.ts:                  "date": "Parsed Date String, e.g. May 4", 
server.ts:                  "matchNumber": 1, 
server.ts:                  "matchday": 1 
server.ts:                } 
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              
server.ts:              CRITICAL RULES:
server.ts:              1. If the user gives you N matches, your array MUST contain exactly N "UPDATE_MATCH" objects. Do NOT stop, do NOT summarize.
server.ts:              2. DO NOT HALUCINATE TEAM IDs. You MUST use the 'ID' corresponding to the "Names" given in the reference. If you cannot find a team, use the name the user provided as the ID.
server.ts:              3. Respect Home and Away perfectly. The first team mentioned usually is home if it says "at home". Read carefully!
server.ts:              4. If the user provides a specific date (like "May 4"), apply that EXPLICIT EXACT date string to the \`date\` field of EVERY match scheduled for that day.
server.ts:              5. DO NOT truncate.
server.ts:              
server.ts:              User Command: ${command}`
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        ]
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const text = response.choices[0]?.message?.content || "[]";
server.ts:      console.log("AI Raw Response:", text);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const commands = JSON.parse(text);
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, commands });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("AI Admin Error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: error.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API Route for Voting (Logging and IP tracking)
server.ts:  app.post("/api/vote", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { candidateId, matchday, voterId, userId, sessionId } = req.body;
server.ts:      const ip = req.headers['x-forwarded-for'] || req.socket.remoteAddress;
server.ts:      const clientIp = Array.isArray(ip) ? ip[0] : ip;
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log(`Vote attempt logged: candidate=${candidateId}, voter=${voterId}, matchday=${matchday}, session=${sessionId}, ip=${clientIp}`);
server.ts:
server.ts:      // We no longer write to Firestore from the server due to IAM cross-project issues.
server.ts:      // The client handles the primary write.
server.ts:      // We return success here to avoid confusing the client.
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, message: "Vote attempt logged" });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error logging vote:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(200).json({ success: false, error: "Internal server error", details: error.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.delete("/api/news/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { id } = req.params;
server.ts:      const { error } = await supabase.from('news').delete().eq('id', id);
server.ts:      if (error) throw error;
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, message: "News deleted successfully" });
server.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error deleting news:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: "Internal server error", details: error.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  async function handleNewsGeneration(matchData: any, leagueTable: any, trigger: string) {
server.ts:    console.log('[News] Supabase URL:', process.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL ? 'SET' : 'MISSING');
server.ts:    console.log('[News] Service key:', process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY ? 'SET' : 'MISSING');
server.ts:    console.log('[News] Anon key:', process.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY ? 'SET' : 'MISSING');
server.ts:
server.ts:    const config = await getAiConfig();
server.ts:    if (!config.key) throw new Error("GROQ_API_KEY is not configured.");
server.ts:
server.ts:    const groq = new Groq({ apiKey: config.key });
server.ts:
server.ts:    const trimmedMatch = matchData ? {
server.ts:      homePlayer: matchData.homePlayer || matchData.team1 || matchData.homeTeam,
server.ts:      awayPlayer: matchData.awayPlayer || matchData.team2 || matchData.awayTeam,
server.ts:      homeScore: matchData.homeScore ?? matchData.team1Score,
server.ts:      awayScore: matchData.awayScore ?? matchData.team2Score,
server.ts:      scorers: [
server.ts:        ...(matchData.homeScorers || []).map((s: any) => ({
server.ts:          name: s.playerName || s.name,
server.ts:          goals: s.goals,
server.ts:          team: matchData.homePlayer || matchData.team1
server.ts:        })),
server.ts:        ...(matchData.awayScorers || []).map((s: any) => ({
server.ts:          name: s.playerName || s.name,
server.ts:          goals: s.goals,
server.ts:          team: matchData.awayPlayer || matchData.team2
server.ts:        }))
server.ts:      ],
server.ts:      manOfTheMatch: matchData.manOfTheMatch || null,
server.ts:      matchday: matchData.matchday || null
server.ts:    } : null;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const response = await groq.chat.completions.create({
server.ts:      model: config.model,
server.ts:      max_tokens: 300,
server.ts:      messages: [{
server.ts:        role: "user",
server.ts:        content: `You are a savage, funny, dramatic football journalist for UXL — an FC Mobile tournament.
server.ts:Write a 100 word max news article.
server.ts:
server.ts:Match data: ${JSON.stringify(trimmedMatch)}
server.ts:
server.ts:STRICT RULES:
server.ts:- The GAMER usernames are homePlayer and awayPlayer (e.g. "Barnik", "Priyam", "Pritam") — USE THEM by name, every time
server.ts:- NEVER say "the home team" or "the away team" — always use their actual username
server.ts:- ALWAYS mention the MOTM player by name
server.ts:- ALWAYS name the goalscorers
server.ts:- If someone lost badly, ROAST them by username (e.g. "Priyam had a night to forget")
server.ts:- If someone won big, HYPE them by username (e.g. "Barnik is UNSTOPPABLE")
server.ts:- For matchday breakdown, mention EVERY player who played that matchday by name
server.ts:- Be unpredictable — sometimes serious, sometimes savage banter
server.ts:
server.ts:Pick ONE angle randomly:
server.ts:1. 🔥 Savage match reaction — roast the loser by name, hype the winner
server.ts:2. 😂 Full banter — mock the losing gamer's performance
server.ts:3. 📊 Serious breakdown — tactical analysis mentioning both gamers
server.ts:4. 🏆 Bold prediction — call out specific gamers by name for next match
server.ts:5. 📅 Matchday recap — mention ALL gamers who played
server.ts:6. 📈 Form guide — rank gamers by recent form using their names
server.ts:
server.ts:Return ONLY this JSON with no markdown:
server.ts:{"title":"...","content":"...","category":"SPICY|BANTER|ANALYSIS|PREDICTION|MATCHDAY|FORM"}`
server.ts:      }]
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    const rawContent = response.choices[0]?.message?.content || "{}";
server.ts:    console.log("[News] Raw AI response:", rawContent);
server.ts:    const cleanContent = rawContent.replace(/```json|```/g, "").trim();
server.ts:    const article = JSON.parse(cleanContent);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    console.log("[News] Article generated:", article?.title);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const { data, error } = await supabase.from('news').insert({
server.ts:      title: article.title,
server.ts:      content: article.content,
server.ts:      category: article.category,
server.ts:      triggered_by: trigger,
server.ts:      matchday: matchData?.matchday || null
server.ts:    }).select();
server.ts:
server.ts:    console.log('[News] Insert data:', JSON.stringify(data));
server.ts:    console.log('[News] Insert error:', JSON.stringify(error));
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("[News] Error inserting into Supabase:", error);
server.ts:      throw new Error(`Supabase insert failed: ${error.message}`);
server.ts:    } else {
server.ts:      console.log("[News] Successfully inserted news into Supabase:", data);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    return { article, data, error };
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/generate-news", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { matchData, leagueTable, trigger } = req.body;
server.ts:      console.log(`[News] Triggered by: ${trigger}`);
server.ts:      const result = await handleNewsGeneration(matchData, leagueTable, trigger);
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, article: result.article });
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("[News] Generation Error:", e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: e.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/cron-news", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const istHour = new Date(
server.ts:        new Date().toLocaleString("en-US", { timeZone: "Asia/Kolkata" })
server.ts:      ).getHours();
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (istHour >= 2 && istHour < 13) {
server.ts:        return res.json({ skipped: true, reason: "Sleeping hours IST" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      console.log("[News Cron] Triggered via /api/cron-news");
server.ts:      const { data: allMatches } = await supabase
server.ts:        .from('documents')
server.ts:        .select('data')
server.ts:        .eq('collection', 'matches')
server.ts:        .eq('data->>status', 'finished');
server.ts:
server.ts:      const latestMatch = (allMatches || [])
server.ts:        .map((r: any) => r.data)
server.ts:        .sort((a: any, b: any) => (b.matchNumber || 0) - (a.matchNumber || 0))[0];
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!latestMatch) {
server.ts:         return res.json({ skipped: true, reason: "No finished matches found" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const result = await handleNewsGeneration(latestMatch, null, 'cron');
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, article: result.article });
server.ts:    } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("[News Cron] Error:", e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: e.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Vite middleware for development
server.ts:  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
server.ts:    const { createServer: createViteServer } = await import("vite");
server.ts:    const vite = await createViteServer({
server.ts:      server: { middlewareMode: true },
server.ts:      appType: "spa",
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    app.use(vite.middlewares);
server.ts:  } else {
server.ts:    const distPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist');
server.ts:    app.use(express.static(distPath));
server.ts:    app.get('*', (req, res) => {
server.ts:      res.sendFile(path.join(distPath, 'index.html'));
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  if (!process.env.VERCEL) {
server.ts:    // Listen unconditionally unless running in Vercel.
server.ts:    const server = app.listen(Number(PORT), "0.0.0.0", () => {
server.ts:      console.log(`Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Internal scheduler - only runs 1pm to 2am IST
server.ts:    const scheduleNewsGeneration = () => {
server.ts:      setInterval(async () => {
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const istHour = new Date(
server.ts:            new Date().toLocaleString("en-US", { timeZone: "Asia/Kolkata" })
server.ts:          ).getHours();
server.ts:
server.ts:          // OFF during 2am to 1pm IST (auto scheduler only)
server.ts:          if (istHour >= 2 && istHour < 13) {
server.ts:            console.log(`[News Scheduler] Sleeping — IST hour ${istHour}, skipping`);
server.ts:            return;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          console.log(`[News Scheduler] Triggering automatic news generation (IST hour ${istHour})`);
server.ts:          
server.ts:          // Get latest match
server.ts:          const { data: allMatches } = await supabase
server.ts:            .from('documents')
server.ts:            .select('data')
server.ts:            .eq('collection', 'matches')
server.ts:            .eq('data->>status', 'finished');
server.ts:
server.ts:          const latestMatch = (allMatches || [])
server.ts:            .map((r: any) => r.data)
server.ts:            .sort((a: any, b: any) => (b.matchNumber || 0) - (a.matchNumber || 0))[0];
server.ts:
server.ts:          if (latestMatch) {
server.ts:            await handleNewsGeneration(latestMatch, null, 'scheduler');
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:          console.error("[News Scheduler] Error:", err);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }, 2 * 60 * 60 * 1000); // Every 2 hours
server.ts:    };
server.ts:
server.ts:    scheduleNewsGeneration();
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  export default app;

supabase_schema.sql:-- Run this in your Supabase SQL Editor to complete the migration!
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE public.documents (
supabase_schema.sql:  id TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  collection TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  data JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
supabase_schema.sql:  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  PRIMARY KEY (collection, id)
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Enable RLS to prevent abuse
supabase_schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.documents ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Allow anonymous read" ON public.documents
supabase_schema.sql:  FOR SELECT USING (true);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated insert" ON public.documents
supabase_schema.sql:  FOR INSERT TO authenticated WITH CHECK (true);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated update" ON public.documents
supabase_schema.sql:  FOR UPDATE TO authenticated USING (true);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated delete" ON public.documents
supabase_schema.sql:  FOR DELETE TO authenticated USING (true);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE news (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  title TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  content TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  category TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  matchday INT,
supabase_schema.sql:  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
supabase_schema.sql:  triggered_by TEXT
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE INDEX idx_documents_collection ON public.documents(collection);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Indexes for fast status querying and JSONB extraction
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE INDEX idx_documents_data_status ON public.documents USING gin (data jsonb_path_ops);
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE INDEX idx_documents_status ON public.documents ((data->>'status'));
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE INDEX idx_documents_collection_status ON public.documents (collection, (data->>'status'));
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Enable Realtime for the documents table
supabase_schema.sql:begin;
supabase_schema.sql:  -- remove the supabase_realtime publication
supabase_schema.sql:  drop publication if exists supabase_realtime;
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:  -- re-create the supabase_realtime publication with no tables
supabase_schema.sql:  create publication supabase_realtime;
supabase_schema.sql:commit;
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- add the news table to the publication
supabase_schema.sql:alter publication supabase_realtime add table public.news;
supabase_schema.sql:

test.js:const fs = require('fs');
test.js:const appCode = fs.readFileSync('./src/App.tsx', 'utf8');
test.js:
test.js:const matches = [...appCode.matchAll(/sm\.home === "([^"]+)" && sm\.away === "([^"]+)"\) \{\s*homeScore = (\d+); awayScore = (\d+);/g)];
test.js:
test.js:const points = {};
test.js:matches.forEach(m => {
test.js:  const home = m[1];
test.js:  const away = m[2];
test.js:  const homeScore = parseInt(m[3]);
test.js:  const awayScore = parseInt(m[4]);
test.js:
